1471:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 1.0 /
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ratio
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    transactions_1k;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 1.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ratio_eur_czk
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    transactions_1k;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_eur_czk
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency IN ('EUR', 'CZK');
1472:
SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(m.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth m ON c.CustomerID = m.CustomerID
WHERE m.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.CustomerID, T1.Consumption FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.CustomerID, T1.Consumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND T2.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T1.CustomerID, T1.Segment FROM customers AS T1 JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Date LIKE '2012%' AND T1.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T2.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.CustomerID, T2.Segment FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency
FROM yearmonth AS ym
JOIN customers AS c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
1473:
SELECT AVG(T1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND LEFT(yearmonth.Date, 4) = '2013'

SELECT AVG(t1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth t1
JOIN customers t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
WHERE t2.Segment = 'SME'
AND t1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME'
AND SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(T1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND T1.Date LIKE '2013%'

SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers
JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT SUM(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(T2.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';
1479:
SELECT 
    ym.Date AS Year,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    ym.Date
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    LEFT(T1.Date, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    LEFT(T1.Date, 4)
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) AS Year, SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY Year
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) AS Year, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
INNER JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4)
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) AS Year,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ym.Date AS Year,
    SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    STRFTIME('%Y', ym.Date)
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
WHERE 
    T1.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4)
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1480:
SELECT 
    T2.Date AS Month,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID AND T2.GasStationID = T3.GasStationID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'SME'
    AND T2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    T2.Date
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Month, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY ym.Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Month, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
GROUP BY ym.Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Segment = 'SME'
    AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'SME' AND
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Segment = 'SME'
    AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.Date, MAX(T1.Consumption) AS MaxConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
AND T2.Segment = 'SME'
GROUP BY T2.Date;

SELECT SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 7) AS Month, AVG(T2.Consumption) AS AverageConsumption
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.Segment = 'SME' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY Month
ORDER BY AverageConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 7) AS YearMonth,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND 
    customers.Segment = 'SME'
GROUP BY 
    YearMonth
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

1483:
SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date LIKE '201308%' OR Date LIKE '201309%' OR Date LIKE '201310%' OR Date LIKE '201311%'
SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'

SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND 
      SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2013' AND 
      SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) BETWEEN '08' AND '11';

SELECT SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T1.CustomerID = 6 AND T1.Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311';
SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date LIKE '201308%' AND Date LIKE '201311%'
SELECT SUM(T1.Consumption) FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311' AND T2.CustomerID = 6
SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND (SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) BETWEEN '08' AND '11')
1484:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM 
    gasstations;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Difference
FROM 
    gasstations
WHERE 
    Segment = 'Discount';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInCzechRepublic,
       COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInSlovakia,
       (COUNT(CASE WHEN Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 END)) AS Difference
FROM gasstations
WHERE Segment = 'Discount';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DiscountDifference
FROM gasstations AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID
WHERE T1.Segment = 'Discount';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DiscountDifference
FROM gasstations AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID
WHERE T1.Segment LIKE '%Discount%'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInCzechRepublic,
       COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStationsInSlovakia,
       (COUNT(CASE WHEN Segment LIKE '%discount%' THEN 1 END) FILTER (WHERE Country = 'CZE')) -
       (COUNT(CASE WHEN Segment LIKE '%discount%' THEN 1 END) FILTER (WHERE Country = 'SVK')) AS Difference
FROM gasstations;
1498: SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS MaxMonthlyConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012';
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS MaxConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS HighestMonthlyConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2012-%'
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS MaxMonthlyConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
SELECT MAX(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'

SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS HighestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'

SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS MaxMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'

SELECT max(Consumption), SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY Month;
1490:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) AS Percentage
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)) * 100) AS Percentage
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)) * 100 AS Percentage
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T3.TransactionID = T2.TransactionID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) AS Percentage
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)) AS Percentage_LAM_Customers_Consumed_More_than_46_73
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) AS Percentage
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID)) * 100) AS Percentage
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ((COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(T2.CustomerID)) * 100) AS percentage
FROM 
    customers AS C
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T1 ON C.CustomerID = T1.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.TransactionID = T2.TransactionID
WHERE 
    C.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Segment = 'LAM' ) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN transactions_1k AS T3 ON T1.TransactionID = T3.TransactionID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'LAM'
AND T1.Consumption > 46.73;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*)
     FROM transactions_1k AS t
     JOIN customers AS c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND c.Currency = 'CZK') -
    
    (SELECT COUNT(*)
     FROM transactions_1k AS t
     JOIN customers AS c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND c.Currency = 'EUR') AS difference;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageChange
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageChange ASC, PercentageChange DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    yearmonth y
JOIN 
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    ABS(PercentageIncrease) DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageIncrease ASC, PercentageIncrease DESC;

SELECT c.Segment,
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY ABS(PercentageIncrease) DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    ABS(PercentageIncrease);

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    MAX(((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS MaxPercentageIncrease,
    MIN(((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS MinPercentageDecrease
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    ym.Date LIKE '2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment;

SELECT c.Segment, ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS Percentage_increase
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY Percentage_increase DESC;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
JOIN 
    gasstations g ON y.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE 
    y.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    ABS(PercentageIncrease) DESC;

SELECT c.Segment,
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
      SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS Percentage_Increase
FROM yearmonth AS ym
JOIN customers AS c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY ABS(Percentage_Increase) DESC;

SELECT 
    t.Segment,
    AVG(t.Consumption) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS t
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    t.Segment
ORDER BY 
    AvgAnnualConsumption;

SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Segment;

WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.TransactionID, t.Date, t.Time, c.CustomerID, c.Segment, t.Amount, t.Price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
grouped_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment, SUM(Amount) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM filtered_transactions
    GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
),
least_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(TotalConsumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM grouped_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
),
final_results AS (
    SELECT gc.Segment, gc.TotalConsumption / COUNT(gc.CustomerID) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
    FROM grouped_customers gc
    JOIN least_consumption_customers lcc ON gc.Segment = lcc.Segment AND gc.TotalConsumption = lcc.MinConsumption
    GROUP BY gc.Segment
)
SELECT f.Segment, f.AvgAnnualConsumption,
       LEAD(f.AvgAnnualConsumption) OVER (ORDER BY f.Segment) - f.AvgAnnualConsumation AS DiffWithNext,
       LAG(f.AvgAnnualConsumation) OVER (ORDER BY f.Segment) - f.AvgAnnualConsumation AS DiffWithPrevious
FROM final_results f
ORDER BY f.Segment;

WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.TransactionID, t.Date, t.Amount, y.Consumption
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
),
segmented_consumption AS (
    SELECT t.Segment, AVG(t.Amount + y.Consumption) AS avg_annual_consumption
    FROM filtered_transactions t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY t.Segment
)
SELECT
    'SME vs LAM' AS comparison,
    (s1.avg_annual_consumption - s2.avg_annual_consumption) AS difference
FROM segmented_consumption s1
JOIN segmented_consumption s2 ON s1.Segment = 'SME' AND s2.Segment = 'LAM'
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'LAM vs KAM' AS comparison,
    (s2.avg_annual_consumption - s3.avg_annual_consumption) AS difference
FROM segmented_consumption s2
JOIN segmented_consumption s3 ON s2.Segment = 'LAM' AND s3.Segment = 'KAM'
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'KAM vs SME' AS comparison,
    (s3.avg_annual_consumption - s1.avg_annual_consumption) AS difference
FROM segmented_consumption s3
JOIN segmented_consumption s1 ON s3.Segment = 'KAM' AND s1.Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    'SME vs LAM' AS SegmentPair,
    AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) - MIN(SUM(transactions_1k.Amount)) / COUNT(DISTINCT transactions_1k.CustomerID) AS DifferenceInAverageConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k
JOIN 
    customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth ON transactions_1k.TransactionID = yearmonth.TransactionID
WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    customers.Segment
HAVING 
    customers.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM');

SELECT 
    'LAM vs KAM' AS SegmentPair,
    AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) - MIN(SUM(transactions_1k.Amount)) / COUNT(DISTINCT transactions_1k.CustomerID) AS DifferenceInAverageConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k
JOIN 
    customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth ON transactions_1k.TransactionID = yearmonth.TransactionID
WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    customers.Segment
HAVING 
    customers.Segment IN ('LAM', 'KAM');

SELECT 
    'KAM vs SME' AS SegmentPair,
    AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) - MIN(SUM(transactions_1k.Amount)) / COUNT(DISTINCT transactions_1k.CustomerID) AS DifferenceInAverageConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k
JOIN 
    customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth ON transactions_1k.TransactionID = yearmonth.TransactionID
WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    customers.Segment
HAVING 
    customers.Segment IN ('KAM', 'SME');

WITH AvgConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    JOIN 
        customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG_Consumption,
    LAG(AVG_Consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) AS prev_avg_consumption,
    LEAD(AVG_Consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) AS next_avg_consumption,
    AVG_Consumption - LAG(AVG_Consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    AVG_Consumption - LEAD(AVG_Consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    LAG(AVG_Consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) - LEAD(AVG_Consumption) OVER (ORDER BY Segment) AS diff_SME_KAM
FROM 
    AvgConsumption
ORDER BY 
    Segment;

WITH LowConsumers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, MIN(Consumption) AS LowestConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
),
AvgConsumption AS (
    SELECT Segment, SUM(Consumption) / COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    JOIN LowConsumers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = LowConsumers.CustomerID AND yearmonth.Consumption = LowConsumers.LowestConsumption
    WHERE Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumation FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS Diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumation FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumation FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS Diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumation FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumation FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS Diff_KAM_SME;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        t1.CustomerID,
        t1.Date,
        t1.Consumption,
        t2.Segment
    FROM 
        yearmonth t1
    JOIN 
        customers t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        t1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND t2.Currency = 'CZK'
),
min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(Consumption) AS min_consu
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    s1.Segment AS Segment1,
    s2.Segment AS Segment2,
    AVG(f1.Consumption) - AVG(f2.Consumption) AS Difference
FROM 
    filtered_data f1
JOIN 
    min_consumption m1 ON f1.CustomerID = m1.CustomerID AND f1.Consumption = m1.min_consu
JOIN 
    filtered_data f2
JOIN 
    min_consumption m2 ON f2.CustomerID = m2.CustomerID AND f2.Consumption = m2.min_consu
JOIN 
    min_consumption s1 ON f1.Segment = s1.Segment
JOIN 
    min_consumption s2 ON f2.Segment = s2.Segment
WHERE 
    s1.Segment < s2.Segment
ORDER BY 
    s1.Segment;

WITH LowestConsumption AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(Amount) AS MinAmount
    FROM transactions_1k AS t
    JOIN customers AS c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY Segment
),
SegmentsWithTotal AS (
    SELECT s.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM transactions_1k AS t
    JOIN customers AS c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    JOIN LowestConsumption AS l ON s.Segment = l.Segment
    WHERE t.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND t.Amount <= l.MinAmount
    GROUP BY s.Segment
),
AnnualAverages AS (
    SELECT Segment, TotalConsumption / COUNT(CustomerID) AS AnnualAverage
    FROM SegmentsWithTotal
)
SELECT 
    'SME vs LAM' AS Comparison,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN AnnualAverage ELSE NULL END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN AnnualAverage ELSE NULL END) AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'LAM vs KAM' AS Comparison,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN AnnualAverage ELSE NULL END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN AnnualAverage ELSE NULL END) AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'KAM vs SME' AS Comparison,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN AnnualAverage ELSE NULL END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN AnnualAverage ELSE NULL END) AS Difference
FROM AnnualAverages;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    c.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY 
    SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Segment,
    c.Currency,
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT 
            CustomerID 
        FROM 
            transactions_1k 
        GROUP BY 
            CustomerID 
        ORDER BY 
            SUM(Amount) DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency;

WITH TopSpendingCustomer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Amount) as TotalAmount
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
AveragePricePerItem AS (
    SELECT AVG(Price / Amount) as AvgPricePerItem
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM TopSpendingCustomer)
)
SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Segment,
    c.Currency,
    t.AvgPricePerItem
FROM 
    TopSpendingCustomer ts,
    AveragePricePerItem t,
    customers c
WHERE 
    ts.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND
    ts.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID, 
    c.Segment, 
    c.Currency, 
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.CustomerID = (
        SELECT 
            CustomerID 
        FROM 
            transactions_1k 
        GROUP BY 
            CustomerID 
        ORDER BY 
            SUM(Amount) DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, 
    c.Segment, 
    c.Currency;

-- Step 1: Find the top-spending customer
WITH TopSpender AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Amount) as TotalAmount
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC
    LIMIT 1
),

-- Step 2: Calculate the average price per single item for the top-spending customer
AveragePrice AS (
    SELECT AVG(Price) as AvgPricePerItem
    FROM transactions_1k
    JOIN TopSpender ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = TopSpender.CustomerID
)

-- Step 3: Determine the currency used by the top-spending customer
SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    c.Segment,
    c.Currency,
    ap.AvgPricePerItem
FROM TopSpender t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
CROSS JOIN AveragePrice ap;

SELECT TOP 1 CustomerID, AVG(Price) AS AveragePricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC;

SELECT 
    (t2.Consumption_2012 - t2.Consumption_2013) / t2.Consumption_2012 AS Consumption_Decrease_Rate
FROM 
    transactions_1k t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON t1.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND t1.Date = ym.Date
WHERE 
    t1.Amount = 634.8 AND t1.Date = '2012-08-25'

SELECT 
    (T2.Consumption_2012 - T2.Consumption_2013) / T2.Consumption_2012 AS Consumption_Decrease_Rate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Date = '2012-08-25' AND 
    T1.Amount = 634.8;

SELECT 
    (y2.Consumption - y1.Consumption) / y2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    yearmonth y1
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2 ON y1.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID AND y1.Date LIKE '%2012%' AND y2.Date LIKE '%2013%'
WHERE 
    y1.Date = '2012-08-25' AND y1.Amount = 634.8;

SELECT 
    (y2.Consumption - y1.Consumption) / y2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    yearmonth AS y1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS y2 ON y1.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID AND y2.Date LIKE '%2013%'
WHERE 
    y1.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT 
            CustomerID 
        FROM 
            transactions_1k 
        WHERE 
            Date = '2012-08-25' 
            AND Amount = 634.8
    ) 
    AND y1.Date LIKE '%2012%'

SELECT 
    (t2.Consumption - t3.Consumption) / t2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID AND t1.Date = '2012-08-25'
JOIN 
    yearmonth t3 ON t1.CustomerID = t3.CustomerID AND t3.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE 
    t1.Amount = 634.8;

SELECT 
    (T2.Consumption - T3.Consumption) / T2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID AND T3.Date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
WHERE 
    T1.Amount = 634.8 AND T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '%2012%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '%2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '%2012%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID AND T1.Date = T2.Date
WHERE 
    T1.Amount = 634.8 AND T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

WITH consumption_data AS (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS consumption_2012
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID IN (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM transactions_1k
        WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8
    ) AND strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012',

    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID IN (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM transactions_1k
        WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8
    ) AND strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013'
)
SELECT (consumption_2012 - consumption_2013) / consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_data;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.event_date) = '2019' THEN T1.spent ELSE 0 END) -
SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.event_date) = '2020' THEN T1.spent ELSE 0 END) AS diff_spent
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE T2.type LIKE '%Student_Club%'

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T2.event_date) = '2019' THEN T1.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T2.event_date) = '2020' THEN T1.spent ELSE 0 END) AS diff_spent
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE T2.club_name = 'Student_Club'

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END)) AS difference_spent
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE T1.club = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM 
    event AS T1
JOIN 
    budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE 
    T1.type LIKE '%Student_Club%'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference_spent
FROM 
    event AS T1
JOIN 
    budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM 
    event AS T1
JOIN 
    budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE 
    T1.type = 'Student_Club';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - 
       SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference_in_spent
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event;

1376:
SELECT e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent / b.amount AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent / b.amount AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM budget b
INNER JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
AND (b.spent / b.amount) = (
    SELECT MAX(b2.spent / b2.amount)
    FROM budget b2
    JOIN event e2 ON b2.link_to_event = e2.event_id
    WHERE e2.status = 'Closed'
);

SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / COALESCE(b.amount, 0)) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense x ON b.budget_id = x.link_to_budget
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount,
       (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT b.*, e.event_id, e.event_name, e.status, (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio 
FROM budget AS b 
JOIN event AS e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleInPatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleOutPatients,
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 2) AS PercentageDeviation
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) - 100) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((COUNT(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) - 100) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CountInPatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CountOutPatients,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient
INNER JOIN 
    Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE 
    SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS Percentage_In_Patients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS Percentage_Out_Patients
FROM 
    Patient AS P
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS inpatient_percentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS outpatient_percentage
FROM 
    Patient AS P
INNER JOIN 
    Examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE 
    P.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ID) AS Percentage_In_Patients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ID) AS Percentage_Out_Patients,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ID)) - (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ID))) * 100 AS Deviation_Percentage
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    SEX = 'M';

1168:
SELECT 
    l.Date AS LabCompletionDate,
    YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.Birthday AS Birthdate,
    YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS AgeAtArrival,
    l.Date AS LabCompletionDate
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.Date AS Laboratory_Completion_Date, p.Birthday - YEAR(p.`First Date`) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.Birthday AS Birthdate,
    p.`First Date` AS ArrivalDate,
    YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS AgeAtArrival,
    l.Date AS LabCompletionDate
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    AgeAtArrival DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, MAX(l.Date) AS LabCompletionDate, YEAR(p.Birthday) - YEAR(p.First Date) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY AgeAtAdmission DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(laboratory.Date) AS Laboratory_Completion_Date,
    (YEAR(patient.First Date) - YEAR(patient.Birthday)) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Patient AS patient
JOIN 
    Examination AS examination ON patient.ID = examination.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS laboratory ON patient.ID = laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    patient.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Lab_Completion_Date,
    (YEAR(p.First Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.Patient_ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.Patient_ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    Laboratory.Date,
    (YEAR(Patient.First Date) - YEAR(Patient.Birthday)) AS Age
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    Patient.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(Laboratory.Date) AS Lab_Completion_Date,
    YEAR(Patient.`First Date`) - YEAR(Patient.Birthday) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Examination
INNER JOIN 
    Patient ON Examination.Patient_ID = Patient.ID
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.Patient_ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    Patient.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;
1169:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Patient;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Laboratory;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.SEX = 'M' AND T1.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.SEX = 'F' AND T1.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleCount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FemaleCount,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    Laboratory;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Patient P
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Male_Female_Ratio
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(p.Birthday) < 18
AND YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(p.Birthday) < 18 AND YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)

WHERE YEAR(p.Birthday) < 18 AND YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993;

FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(p.Birthday) < 18
AND YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1993';

SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) AS NumberOfUnderagePatientsExamined
FROM Patient AS T1

WHERE YEAR(T1.Birthday) < 1998 AND YEAR(T2.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993;

INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE YEAR(T1.Birthday) < 1998 AND YEAR(T2.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Patient.ID) AS NumberOfUnderagePatients
FROM Examination
JOIN Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE YEAR(Patient.Birthday) < 18
AND YEAR(Examination.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1993';
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.ID) FROM Examination AS t1 JOIN Patient AS t2 ON t1.ID = t2.ID WHERE YEAR(t1.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993 AND YEAR(t2.Birthday) < 18;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)

1175:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T1.`Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.Birthday) AS Age,
    T2.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
ORDER BY 
    T1.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis,
    p.ID
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
ORDER BY 
    e.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, l.Date) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis,
    l.Date AS Examination_Date
FROM 
    Laboratory l
JOIN 
    Patient p ON l.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM `Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Birthday) AS Age,
    P.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination E
JOIN 
    Patient P ON E.ID = P.ID
ORDER BY 
    E.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Examination.`Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Patient.Birthday) AS Age,
    Patient.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
ORDER BY 
    Examination.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    e.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Examination)

SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    e.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Examination);

SELECT 
    EXAMINATION.Date AS Examination_Date,
    EXAMINATION.aCL_IgG,
    EXAMINATION.aCL_IgM,
    EXAMINATION.ANA,
    EXAMINATION.ANA_Pattern,
    EXAMINATION.aCL_IgA,
    EXAMINATION.Diagnosis,
    EXAMINATION.KCT,
    EXAMINATION.RVVT,
    EXAMINATION.LAC,
    EXAMINATION.Symptoms,
    EXAMINATION.Thrombosis,
    PATIENT.Age,
    PATIENT.Description,
    PATIENT.First_Date,
    PATIENT.Admission,
    PATIENT.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination EXAMINATION
JOIN 
    Patient PATIENT ON EXAMINATION.Patient_ID = PATIENT.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory LABORATORY ON PATIENT.ID = LABORATORY.Patient_ID
WHERE 
    LABORATORY.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.`Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T1.Birthday) AS Age,
    T1.Description AS DoctorDiagnosis
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID
WHERE 
    T3.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

1185:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
WHERE 
    Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN `Date` LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN `Date` LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
WHERE 
    Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' AND T_1.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN T_2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND T_1.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN T_2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T_1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T_2 ON T_1.ID = T_2.ID;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' AND Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient AS P
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-11-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN T.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN T.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN T.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T
JOIN 
    Patient AS P ON T.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' AND 
    (T.Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' OR T.Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31');

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN L.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN L.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN L.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory L
JOIN 
    Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT CASE WHEN UA > 8.0 AND SEX = 'M' OR UA > 6.5 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal Range' ELSE 'Not in Normal Range' END AS UricAcidStatus
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.ID = 57266;

SELECT CASE 
           WHEN l.UA > 8.0 AND p.SEX = 'M' OR l.UA > 6.5 AND p.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal'
           ELSE 'Abnormal'
       END AS UricAcidStatus
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.ID = 57266;
SELECT UA, SEX FROM Laboratory WHERE ID = 57266 AND (UA > 8.0 OR (UA > 6.5 AND SEX = 'F'))

SELECT CASE WHEN UA > 8.0 AND SEX = 'M' OR UA > 6.5 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS UricAcidWithinNormalRange
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Patient.ID = 57266;

SELECT l.UA, p.SEX
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.ID = 57266 AND ((p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0) OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5))

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN p.ID = 57266 AND l.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN p.ID = 57266 AND l.UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Not Normal'
    END AS UrineAcidStatus
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Not Normal'
    END AS UricAcidRange
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.ID = 57266;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN l.UA > 8.0 AND p.SEX = 'M' OR l.UA > 6.5 AND p.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Not Normal'
    END AS UrineAcidRange
FROM 
    Laboratory l
JOIN 
    Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.ID = 57266;

1242:
SELECT P.*
FROM Laboratory AS L
JOIN Patient AS P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE YEAR(L.Date) = 1984
  AND (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(P.Birthday)) < 50
  AND L.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT DISTINCT p.*
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
AND strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
AND (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday, p.Description, p.First_Date, p.Admission, p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
AND (YEAR(l.Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), p.Birthday) / 365 < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT DISTINCT P.ID
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', L.Date) = '1984'
AND L.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400
AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) < 50;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
AND SUBSTR(CAST(p.Birthday AS TEXT), 1, INSTR(p.Birthday, '-') - 1) - SUBSTR(CAST(GETDATE() AS TEXT), 1, INSTR(GETDATE(), '-') - 1) < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT DISTINCT patient.ID
FROM Laboratory AS laboratory
JOIN Patient AS patient ON laboratory.ID = patient.ID
WHERE YEAR(laboratory.Date) = 1984
AND SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(patient.Birthday)) < 50
AND laboratory.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT l.ID, l.Date, l.PLT
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, CURRENT_DATE) < 50 AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Percentage_Female_With_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(NOW(), Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS percentage_female_with_abnormal_pt
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS Percentage_Females_with_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55
    AND L.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS Percentage_Females_With_ABNORMAL_PT
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55;

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS Percentage_Female_With_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55
    AND L.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS Percentage_Female_With_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS FemalePercentage
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, T2.Birthday, GETDATE()) > 55 AND T1.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Laboratory.PT >= 14 AND Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(Laboratory.PT)) * 100 AS FemalePercentageAbnormalPT
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(Patient.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS percentage_female_with_abnormal_pt
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE SUBTRACT(YEAR(GETDATE()), YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55;

FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '2012'
AND T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012')

WHERE T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012' AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL)

SELECT l.name AS league_name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.id
ORDER BY SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.country_id = l.country_id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.team_long_name
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id
JOIN League AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.league_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
AND T2.season = '2009/2010'
AND T2.away_team_goal > T2.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T1.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) AS num_wins
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010' AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC;

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T2.team_api_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
JOIN Team AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T1.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
JOIN Team AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T3.team_long_name
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC;

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_api_id <> T1.home_team_api_id
GROUP BY T1.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id
JOIN League AS T3 ON T2.league_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T2.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T1.team_api_id
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN T2.away_team_goal > T2.home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) AS num_wins
FROM Match AS M
JOIN Team AS T1 ON M.away_team_api_id = T1.team_api_id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON M.home_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
JOIN League AS L ON M.league_id = L.id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2009/2010'
AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.team_long_name, SUM(CASE WHEN T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_wins
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
JOIN Team AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T3.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS current_age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'

SELECT p.player_name, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT T1.player_name, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS current_age
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97
AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015';

SELECT 
    p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY 
    p.player_api_id;

SELECT T1.player_name, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS age
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'

SELECT 
    p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday) AS age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND STRFTIME('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY 
    p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS current_age
FROM 
    Player p
INNER JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY 
    p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    T1.player_api_id, 
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS age 
FROM 
    Player AS T1 
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id 
WHERE 
    T2.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31' 
    AND T2.sprint_speed >= 97 
GROUP BY 
    T1.player_api_id;

SELECT T1.id, T1.birthday, T2.sprint_speed
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.player_api_id = T3.home_player_1 OR T2.player_api_id = T3.away_player_1
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T3.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY T1.id
ORDER BY T1.id;

SELECT AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
)
ORDER BY avg_finishing_rate DESC;

SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height IN ((SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player), (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player))

SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.player_api_id, AVG(T1.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
GROUP BY T1.player_api_id
UNION
SELECT T1.player_api_id, AVG(T1.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
GROUP BY T1.player_api_id

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(T2.finishing) > AVG(T2.finishing) THEN 'Highest Height Players'
        ELSE 'Lowest Height Players'
    END AS GroupWithHigherFinishingRate,
    AVG(T2.finishing) AS AverageFinishingRate
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2
ON 
    T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.height IN ((SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player), (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player));

WITH HeightGroups AS (
    SELECT *, 
           CASE 
               WHEN height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) THEN 'highest'
               ELSE 'shortest'
           END AS height_group
    FROM Player
),
FinishingRates AS (
    SELECT 
        height_group,
        AVG(Player_Attributes.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM HeightGroups
    JOIN Player_Attributes ON HeightGroups.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
    GROUP BY height_group
)
SELECT * FROM FinishingRates WHERE avg_finishing = (SELECT MAX(avg_finishing) FROM FinishingRates);

SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player, Player_Attributes WHERE p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id)
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH HeightRangePlayers AS (
    SELECT player_api_id, finishing
    FROM Player
    WHERE height BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) AND (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
),
AvgFinishingRate AS (
    SELECT player_api_id, AVG(finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
    FROM HeightRangePlayers
    GROUP BY player_api_id
)
SELECT player_api_id, player_name, avg_finishing_rate
FROM AvgFinishingRate
JOIN Player ON AvgFinishingRate.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id
ORDER BY avg_finishing_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') -
    (SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference_of_average_ball_control

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) - 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) 
     FROM Player AS T1 
     JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id 
     WHERE T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') -
    (SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) 
     FROM Player AS T1

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 100 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 100 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes 
      JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id 
      WHERE Player.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes 
      JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id 
      WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes 
     JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id 
     WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') * 100 AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T3.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id AND T2.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = T1.player_api_id)
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id AND T3.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = T1.player_api_id)
WHERE 
    T1.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel')
ORDER BY 
    T1.player_name;

SELECT 
    ((p1.overall_rating - p2.overall_rating) / p2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS p2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND p2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    ((P1.overall_rating - P2.overall_rating) / P2.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS P1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS PA1 ON P1.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS P2 ON P2.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
WHERE 
    P1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND P2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 100 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS p JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN T1.overall_rating ELSE NULL END) - MAX(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T1.overall_rating ELSE NULL END)) / 
     MAX(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T1.overall_rating ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    ((pab.overall_rating - pap.overall_rating) / pap.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pap ON p.player_api_id = pap.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pab ON p.player_api_id = pab.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel');

SELECT T2.chanceCreationPassing, T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.home_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id OR T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'Ajax'
ORDER BY T2.chanceCreationPassing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T1.chanceCreationPassing) AS max_chance_creation_passing, T1.chanceCreationPassingClass 
FROM Team_Attributes AS T1 
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id 
WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'Ajax';

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'
SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Match AS T3 ON T1.team_api_id IN (T3.home_team_api_id, T3.away_team_api_id)
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id AND T3.date BETWEEN T2.date AND DATE_ADD(T2.date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT MAX(T2.chanceCreationPassing), T2.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON (T1.home_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id OR T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id)
WHERE (T1.home_team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax') OR T1.away_team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Ajax'))

SELECT 
    MAX(T3.chanceCreationPassing) AS max_chance_creation_passing,
    T3.chanceCreationPassingClass AS chance_creation_passing_class
FROM 
    Team AS T1
JOIN 
    Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.home_team_api_id OR T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id
JOIN 
    Team_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.team_api_id = T3.team_api_id AND T2.date BETWEEN T3.date AND DATE_ADD(T3.date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
WHERE 
    T1.team_long_name = 'Ajax'

SELECT T3.chanceCreationPassing, T3.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.home_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T3 ON T2.team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'Ajax'
AND T3.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE team_api_id = T2.team_api_id)
