1115:
SELECT 
    (p1.overall_rating / p2.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player p2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
    AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' 
    AND pa1.date = '2013-07-12'

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' AND T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
AND
    T3.date = '2013-07-12' AND T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'

SELECT 
    ((pa1.overall_rating - pa2.overall_rating) / pa1.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS p2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
    AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' 
    AND pa1.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    (p1.overall_rating - p2.overall_rating) * 100.0 / p1.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS p1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS pa1 ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS p2 ON p2.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
WHERE 
    p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
    AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
    AND pa1.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' 
    AND T1.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T1.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.date = '2013-07-12' AND 
    (T2.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' OR T2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    (T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) * 100.0 / T2.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T3.player_api_id = T1.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' AND T1.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 
      JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id 
      WHERE T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND T2.date = '2013-07-12') 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 
      JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id 
      WHERE T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND T2.date = '2013-07-12')) / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 
     JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id 
     WHERE T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND T2.date = '2013-07-12') * 100 AS percentage_difference;

WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High'

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Match m
    WHERE (m.home_player_1 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_1 = p.player_api_id)
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM Player tpa
        JOIN Player_Attributes tp ON tpa.player_api_id = tp.player_api_id
        WHERE (tpa.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_2, m.away_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.away_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.away_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.away_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.away_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.away_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.away_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.away_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.away_player_10, m.home_player_11, m.away_player_11)
        AND tp.attacking_work_rate = 'High')
    )
);

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON (pa.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11)
                 AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High')
OR (pa.player_api_id IN (m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11)
     AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'High')
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    WHERE (pa2.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11)
           AND pa2.attacking_work_rate = 'High')
    OR (pa2.player_api_id IN (m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11)
         AND pa2.attacking_work_rate = 'High')
);

881:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS completion_rate
FROM results AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T2.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS "Completion Rate"
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverid) AS completion_rate
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T1.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(r.driverid) AS completion_rate
FROM 
    results r
JOIN 
    races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE 
    ra.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T2.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.driverid) AS completion_rate
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T3.driverid) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN laps AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid AND T2.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T1.date = '1983-07-16'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN T1.driverid ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverid) AS completion_rate
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T1.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.driverid) AS completion_rate
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.date = '1983-07-16'
880:
SELECT 
    (CAST(T1.fastestlapspeed AS REAL) - CAST(T2.fastestlapspeed AS REAL)) * 100 / T1.fastestlapspeed AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.raceid = T2.raceid + 1
JOIN 
    drivers ON T1.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE 
    drivers.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND drivers.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND T1.raceid = 853;

SELECT 
    ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T2.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.raceid = 853
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T3.raceid = 854
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((SELECT T2.fastestLapSpeed FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T3.round = 853) - 
    (SELECT T2.fastestLapSpeed FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T3.round = 854)) * 100 / 
    (SELECT T2.fastestLapSpeed FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T3.round = 853)
AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    (r1.fastestlapspeed - r2.fastestlapspeed) * 100 / r1.fastestlapspeed AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    results r2 ON r1.driverid = r2.driverid AND r1.raceid = 853 AND r2.raceid = 854
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r1.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((r1.fastestlapspeed - r2.fastestlapspeed) / r1.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    results r2 ON r1.driverid = r2.driverid AND r1.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL AND r2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r1.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND r1.raceid = 853
    AND r2.raceid = 854;

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) - MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 854 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END)) / MAX(CASE WHEN r1.raceid = 853 THEN r1.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN 
    races r1 ON r.raceid = r1.raceid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT ((MAX(CASE WHEN T3.raceid = 853 THEN T3.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) - MAX(CASE WHEN T3.raceid = 854 THEN T3.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END)) / MAX(CASE WHEN T3.raceid = 853 THEN T3.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T2.fastestlapspeed * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.raceid = 853
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T3.raceid = 854
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) AS avg_fastest_lap_speed_853,
AVG(CASE WHEN T2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) AS avg_fastest_lap_speed_854
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T3.raceid IN (853, 854);

897:
SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    d.nationality, 
    ds.points
FROM 
    driverstandings ds
JOIN 
    drivers d ON ds.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE 
    ds.wins = (SELECT MAX(wins) FROM driverstandings)
ORDER BY 
    ds.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, ds.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
ORDER BY ds.wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ds.wins) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, SUM(T2.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
GROUP BY T1.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(T2.wins) DESC, SUM(T2.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(r.points) AS max_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE r.position = 1
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(r.position) DESC, max_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.wins) AS total_wins, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY total_wins DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points, COUNT(*) AS num_wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
WHERE ds.wins > 0
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY num_wins DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, SUM(r.points) AS total_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE r.status = 'Winner'
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY COUNT(ra.raceid) DESC, total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, COUNT(T2.wins) AS wins, MAX(T2.points) AS max_points
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
GROUP BY T1.driverid
ORDER BY wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese' AND cs.points = 0 GROUP BY cs.constructorId HAVING COUNT(r.raceId) = 2;

WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'

HAVING SUM(cs.points) = 0 AND COUNT(cs.raceId) = 2;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese'
    AND T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE T2.time IS NOT NULL)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND
    T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS CompletionPercentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE

    T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

955:
SELECT YEAR(races), AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(results.time)) as avg_time_in_seconds
FROM races
JOIN results ON races.raceid = results.raceid
WHERE YEAR(races) < 1975 AND results.position = 1
GROUP BY YEAR(races)
SELECT AVG(T1.time), T2.year FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T2.year < 1975 AND T1.position = 1 GROUP BY T2.year;

SELECT 
    YEAR(races.date) AS year,
    AVG((TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(TIME(results.time), '00:00:00')) / 1000)) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    races
JOIN 
    results ON races.raceid = results.raceid
JOIN 
    driverstandings ON results.driverid = driverstandings.driverid AND results.raceid = driverstandings.raceid
WHERE 
    driverstandings.position = 1 AND YEAR(races.date) < 1975
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races.date);

SELECT 
    YEAR, 
    AVG((HOUR * 3600 + MINUTE * 60 + SECOND / 1000)) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid AND ds.position = 1
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid AND r.points IS NOT NULL
WHERE 
    YEAR < 1975 AND r.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    YEAR;

SELECT AVG(CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS INT) * 3600 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS INT) * 60 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / COUNT(*) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.champion = 1 AND T3.year < 1975;

SELECT AVG((CAST(SUBSTR(T3.time, 1, 2) AS INT) * 3600) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T3.time, 4, 2) AS INT) * 60) + CAST(SUBSTR(T3.time, 7, 2) AS INT)) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T2.status = 'champion' AND T3.year < 1975;

SELECT 
    YEAR(races.date) AS race_year,
    AVG(
        TIME_TO_SEC(CONCAT(
            LEFT(results.time, LOCATE(':', results.time) - 1), ':',
            SUBSTRING(results.time, LOCATE(':', results.time) + 1, LOCATE('.', results.time) - LOCATE(':', results.time) - 1), '.',
            RIGHT(results.time, LENGTH(results.time) - LOCATE('.', results.time))
        ))
    ) / COUNT(*) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers
JOIN 
    results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN 
    races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    YEAR(races.date) < 1975
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(races.date);

SELECT AVG((TIME_PART('hour', T2.time) * 3600 + TIME_PART('minute', T2.time) * 60 + TIME_PART('second', T2.time)) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T2.points = (SELECT MAX(points) FROM results WHERE raceid = T2.raceid)
AND T3.year < 1975;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG((CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 + 
         CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 + 
         CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 7, 3) AS INTEGER))) / 1000 AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    results r
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN 
    races rt ON r.raceid = rt.raceid
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975 AND d.status = 'champion'
GROUP BY 
    r.year;

962:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.laps > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    YEAR(T1.date) BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
    AND YEAR(T2.dob) < 1985;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(dob) < 1985 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT driverId) AS percentage
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN 
    laps l ON r.resultid = l.resultid
WHERE 
    YEAR(r.date) BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

JOIN

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(T1.dob) < 1985 AND T3.laps > 50 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverid) AS percentage
FROM drivers AS T1
INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
INNER JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid

     COUNT(results.driverid)) * 100 AS percentage

    results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid

981:
SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name AS race_name,
    q.date AS race_date,
    q.time AS race_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.dob < (SELECT MIN(date) FROM qualifying)
ORDER BY 
    d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.year, T2.date, T2.time
FROM qualifying AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T1.driverid = (SELECT driverid FROM drivers ORDER BY dob ASC LIMIT 1)

SELECT DISTINCT r.year, d.name, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(q.qualificationdate) AS qualifying_year,
    r.name AS race_name,
    r.date AS race_date,
    r.time AS race_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    q.qualificationdate = (
        SELECT 
            MIN(qualificationdate)
        FROM 
            qualifying
        WHERE 
            driverid = d.driverid
    )
ORDER BY 
    d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T1.name, T1.date, T1.time FROM races AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid ORDER BY T3.dob DESC, T2.date ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    q1.driverid,
    q1.qualifyid,
    r1.name AS race_name,
    r1.date AS race_date,
    r1.time AS race_time
FROM 
    qualifying q1
JOIN 
    races r1 ON q1.raceid = r1.raceid
WHERE 
    q1.driverid IN (
        SELECT 
            driverid
        FROM 
            qualifying
        WHERE 
            date <= (
                SELECT 
                    MIN(date)
                FROM 
                    qualifying
            )
        ORDER BY 
            dob ASC
        LIMIT 1
    );

SELECT r.year, r.name, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverid = d.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid
WHERE q.driverid IN (
    SELECT d.driverid
    FROM drivers d
    JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
    ORDER BY d.dob DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY q.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid AND r.driverid = q.driverid
WHERE q.qualifyid = (SELECT MIN(qualifyid) AS first_qualify_id FROM qualifying WHERE driverid = (SELECT driverid FROM drivers ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1));

944:
SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.points = MAX(r.points) OVER () THEN l.milliseconds ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
     CAST(SUM(l.milliseconds) AS REAL)) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r
JOIN 
    lapTimes l ON r.driverid = l.driverid AND r.raceid = l.raceid
JOIN 
    races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE 
    ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time) / TIME_TO_SEC(LAST_VALUE(T2.time) OVER (ORDER BY T2.position ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING))) * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 
    AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY 
    T2.position;

SELECT 
    ((MAX(T1.milliseconds) - MIN(T1.milliseconds)) / MIN(T1.milliseconds)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.raceid IN (
        SELECT raceid 
        FROM races 
        WHERE name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND YEAR = 2008
    )
ORDER BY 
    T1.position DESC;

SELECT 
    ((MAX(T2.time) - MIN(T2.time)) / MIN(T2.time)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T1.time, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 3600) + 
     (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T1.time, '.', 2), ':', '-') AS UNSIGNED) AS UNSIGNED) * 60) + 
     CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T1.time, '.', 3), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS UNSIGNED)) / 
    ((CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T3.time, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 3600) + 
     (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T3.time, '.', 2), ':', '-') AS UNSIGNED) AS UNSIGNED) * 60) + 
     CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T3.time, '.', 3), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS UNSIGNED)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = "Australian Grand Prix"
ORDER BY 
    T1.position ASC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.time, '.') - INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 - 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000) * 100 / 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000)
AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T2.raceid = T1.raceid AND T2.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceid = T1.raceid)
WHERE 
    T1.raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND NAME = "Australian Grand Prix")
AND 
    T1.position = 1;

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceid,
        d.driverid,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        r.date,
        r.name,
        r.round,
        r.year
    FROM 
        results r
    JOIN 
        drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
    JOIN 
        races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
    WHERE 
        r.year = 2008 AND r.round = 1
),
champion AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(position) AS min_position,
        MAX(position) AS max_position
    FROM 
        race_info
),
champion_time AS (
    SELECT 
        time,
        milliseconds
    FROM 
        race_info
    WHERE 
        position = (SELECT min_position FROM champion)
),
last_place_time AS (
    SELECT 
        time,
        milliseconds
    FROM 
        race_info
    WHERE 
        position = (SELECT max_position FROM champion)
),
time_difference AS (
    SELECT 
        (CAST(milliseconds AS REAL) / 1000) - (SELECT CAST(milliseconds AS REAL) / 1000 FROM last_place_time) AS diff_in_seconds
)
SELECT 
    ((diff_in_seconds / (SELECT CAST(milliseconds AS REAL) / 1000 FROM last_place_time)) * 100) AS percentage_improvement
FROM 
    time_difference;

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, ':') + 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, ':', INSTR(time_champion, ':') + 1) + 1, 2) AS REAL)) * 1000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, '.', INSTR(time_champion, '.') + 1) + 1, 3) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS time_champion_seconds,
    
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':') + 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':', INSTR(time_last_place, ':') + 1) + 1, 2) AS REAL)) * 1000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, '.', INSTR(time_last_place, '.') + 1) + 1, 3) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS time_last_place_seconds,

    (((CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, ':') + 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
      CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, ':', INSTR(time_champion, ':') + 1) + 1, 2) AS REAL)) * 1000 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, '.', INSTR(time_champion, '.') + 1) + 1, 3) AS REAL)) / 1000 -
     
     ((CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':') + 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
       CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':', INSTR(time_last_place, ':') + 1) + 1, 2) AS REAL)) * 1000 +
       CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, '.', INSTR(time_last_place, '.') + 1) + 1, 3) AS REAL)) / 1000) /
     
     ((CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':') + 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
       CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':', INSTR(time_last_place, ':') + 1) + 1, 2) AS REAL)) * 1000 +
       CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, '.', INSTR(time_last_place, '.') + 1) + 1, 3) AS REAL)) / 1000) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM (
    SELECT 
        MIN(time) AS time_champion,
        MAX(time) AS time_last_place
    FROM 
        results
    WHERE 
        raceid = (
            SELECT raceid
            FROM races
            WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
        )
)

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champion_info AS (
    SELECT driverid, TIME FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM race_info)
    AND driverid = (SELECT driverid FROM driverstandings WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM race_info) ORDER BY position ASC LIMIT 1)
),
last_place_info AS (
    SELECT driverid, TIME FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM race_info)
    AND driverid = (SELECT driverid FROM driverstandings WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM race_info) ORDER BY position DESC LIMIT 1)
)
SELECT 
    (CAST((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM last_place_info.TIME) * 3600 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM last_place_info.TIME) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM last_place_info.TIME)) AS REAL) * 1000 + EXTRACT(MILLISECOND FROM last_place_info.TIME)) -
    (CAST((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM champion_info.TIME) * 3600 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM champion_info.TIME) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM champion_info.TIME)) AS REAL) * 1000 + EXTRACT(MILLISECOND FROM champion_info.TIME)) AS time_difference_milliseconds,
    ((CAST((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM last_place_info.TIME) * 3600 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM last_place_info.TIME) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM last_place_info.TIME)) AS REAL) * 1000 + EXTRACT(MILLISECOND FROM last_place_info.TIME)) -
    (CAST((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM champion_info.TIME) * 3600 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM champion_info.TIME) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM champion_info.TIME)) AS REAL) * 1000 + EXTRACT(MILLISECOND FROM champion_info.TIME))) /
    (CAST((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM champion_info.TIME) * 3600 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM champion_info.TIME) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM champion_info.TIME)) AS REAL) * 1000 + EXTRACT(MILLISECOND FROM champion_info.TIME)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM champion_info, last_place_info;
988:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid AND ps.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, AVG(T2.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN pitStops AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE T1.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(T1.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY T1.driverId
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985 AND d.nationality = 'German'
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
JOIN results r ON ps.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;
989:
SELECT r.time 
FROM races AS r 
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid 
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2008 AND res.position = 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2008
ORDER BY r.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.milliseconds FROM results AS r JOIN drivers AS d ON r.driverid = d.driverid JOIN races AS rt ON r.raceid = rt.raceid WHERE rt.year = 2008 AND rt.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' ORDER BY r.position ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY r.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2008
ORDER BY res.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT CONCAT(T2.time, ' ', T2.milliseconds / 1000) AS finish_time
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid AND T1.season = 2008 AND T1.round = 7
JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T1.circuitid = T3.circuitid AND T3.country = 'Canada'
ORDER BY T2.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name, r.time AS finish_time
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND res.position = 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2008 AND res.position = 1;

SELECT T3.forename || ' ' || T3.surname AS driver, T2.time AS finishtime FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name LIKE '%Canadian%' ORDER BY T2.position ASC LIMIT 1
990:
SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructorStandings cs
JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url FROM constructors AS c JOIN constructorStandings AS cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId WHERE r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2009 ORDER BY cs.points DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorStandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2009 AND cs.position = 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorStandings AS cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.constructorRef, T3.url FROM races AS T1 JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid WHERE T1.year = 2009 AND T1.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid AND res.position = 1
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore'

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN results r ON cs.resultid = r.resultid
JOIN races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.year = 2009 AND races.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND cs.position = 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorid = r.constructorid
JOIN races rt ON r.raceid = rt.raceid
JOIN circuits ct ON rt.circuitid = ct.circuitid
WHERE ct.country = 'Singapore' AND rt.year = 2009 AND r.points = (
    SELECT MAX(points)
    FROM results
    WHERE raceid IN (
        SELECT raceid
        FROM races
        JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
        WHERE circuits.country = 'Singapore' AND races.year = 2009
    )
);
994:
SELECT c.name, c.nationality, cs.points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.circuitname LIKE '%Monaco%'
AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cs.points) AS total_points
FROM constructorstandings cs
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM constructorResults cr
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY cr.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(T2.points) AS total_points, T3.name, T3.nationality
FROM races AS T1
JOIN constructorstandings AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid
WHERE T1.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY T2.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, cr.total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN (
    SELECT SUM(cr.points) AS total_points, cr.constructorId
    FROM constructorResults cr
    JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
    GROUP BY cr.constructorId
) cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
ORDER BY cr.total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.date BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
ORDER BY c.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(points), T3.name, T3.nationality
FROM constructorstandings AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T1.constructorid = T3.constructorid
WHERE T2.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T2.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY T3.constructorid
ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(T2.points), T3.name, T3.nationality FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN constructorstandings AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid INNER JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid WHERE T1.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T3.name, T3.nationality ORDER BY SUM(T2.points) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.name, T1.nationality, SUM(T2.points) FROM constructors AS T1 JOIN constructorresults AS T2 ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T3.name = "Monaco Grand Prix" AND T3.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T1.constructorid ORDER BY SUM(T2.points) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN circuits c ON q.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE q.q3 IS NOT NULL AND q.position = 1 AND q.round = 3 AND c.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND YEAR(q.date) = 2008;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.forename, T1.surname
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T2.circuitid = T3.circuitid
WHERE T2.round = 3 AND T2.position = 1 AND T3.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND T2.year = 2008;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.year = 2008 AND T3.round = 3 AND T2.q3 IS NOT NULL;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
INNER JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.round = 3 AND q.q3 IS NOT NULL AND q.q3 = '1';

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T3.circuitid = T2.circuitid
WHERE T2.q3 IS NOT NULL AND T2.q3 = 1 AND T3.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND YEAR(T2.date) = 2008;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId
WHERE T3.year = 2008 AND T3.name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit' AND MIN(T2.q3) = 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.year = 2008 AND T3.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND T2.q3 = 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T3.year = 2008 AND T3.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND T2.position = 1 AND T2.round = 3

SELECT T4.forename, T4.surname
FROM qualifying AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T2.circuitid = T3.circuitid
JOIN drivers AS T4 ON T1.driverid = T4.driverid
WHERE T2.year = 2008 AND T2.round = 3 AND T1.q3 IS NOT NULL;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName FROM drivers d JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid ORDER BY d.dob DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MIN(dob)
    FROM drivers
);

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, T3.name
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.driverid = (
    SELECT MIN(driverid)
    FROM drivers
)
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid;

SELECT T1.forename || ' ' || T1.surname AS FullName, T1.nationality, T2.name AS RaceName
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.grid = 1
WHERE T1.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, T3.name 
FROM drivers AS T1 
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid 
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid 
ORDER BY T1.dob DESC 
LIMIT 1

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC, r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.time
FROM laps l
JOIN circuits c ON l.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT DISTINCT l.time
FROM circuits c
JOIN lapTimes l ON c.circuitid = l.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.time ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, l.time
FROM circuits c
JOIN laps l ON c.circuitid = l.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.time ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.time
FROM circuits c
JOIN laps l ON c.circuitid = l.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, l.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laps l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
JOIN races r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.time ASC;
SELECT l.time FROM drivers d JOIN laps l ON d.driverid = l.driverid JOIN circuits c ON l.circuitid = c.circuitid WHERE c.country = 'Italy'

SELECT DISTINCT l.time
FROM circuits c
JOIN results r ON c.circuitid = r.circuitid
JOIN laps l ON r.raceid = l.raceid AND r.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname, r.fastestLapTime
FROM circuits c
JOIN results r ON c.circuitid = r.circuitid
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY r.fastestLapTime;

SELECT T1.circuitid, T1.circuitref, T1.name, MIN(T2.fastestlaptimes) AS fastest_lap_time
FROM circuits AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.circuitid = T2.circuitid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.country = 'Italy'
GROUP BY T1.circuitid;
1011: SELECT D.forename, D.surname FROM drivers AS D JOIN laptimes AS L ON D.driverid = L.driverid ORDER BY L.time ASC LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM lapTimes)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM lapTimes)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, lt.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE strftime('%s', lt.time) = (
    SELECT MIN(strftime('%s', lt2.time))
    FROM lapTimes lt2
)
ORDER BY lt.time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE l.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM lapTimes)
ORDER BY l.lap ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE SUBSTR(REPLACE(lt.time, ':', ''), 1, INSTR(REPLACE(lt.time, ':', ''), '.') - 1) = (
    SELECT MIN(SUBSTR(REPLACE(lt2.time, ':', ''), 1, INSTR(REPLACE(lt2.time, ':', ''), '.') - 1))
    FROM lapTimes lt2
)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE l.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM lapTimes)
ORDER BY l.time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, lt.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN laptimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TIME_TO_TIMESTAMP(lt.time)) ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
WHERE CAST(LEFT(l.time, CHARINDEX(':', l.time) - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(l.time, CHARINDEX(':', l.time) + 1, CHARINDEX('.', l.time) - CHARINDEX(':', l.time) - 1) AS REAL) +
      CAST(SUBSTR(l.time, CHARINDEX('.', l.time) + 1) AS REAL) / 1000 AS min_time
ORDER BY min_time ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT d.driverid, COUNT(r.resultid) AS num_accidents
FROM results r
JOIN races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.statusid = 3 AND races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS num_accidents
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
AND s.statusId = 3
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_accidents
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN status s ON res.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY res.driverid
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(resultId) AS numberOfAccidents
FROM results
WHERE statusId = 3
AND driverId IN (
    SELECT driverId
    FROM results
    WHERE raceId = (
        SELECT raceId
        FROM races
        WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
    )
)
ORDER BY COUNT(resultId) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS accident_count
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix')
  AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY r.driverId
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(accident_count) AS max_accidents FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count, driverId FROM results WHERE raceId IN ( SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' ) AND statusId = 3 GROUP BY driverId );

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS num_accidents
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE r.statusId = 3 AND ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND d.driverId != r.fastestLap
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(num_accidents) AS max_accidents
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_accidents, driverId 
    FROM results 
    JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
    WHERE races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND results.statusId = 3
    GROUP BY driverId
) AS subquery

SELECT r.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS accident_count
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE s.status = 'Accident' AND ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY r.driverId
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_marvel_bad_alignment
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.id)) * 100 AS percentage_bad_align,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_marvel_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage_bad_alignments,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad_alignments
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS marvel_comics_count
FROM 
    alignment AS T1
JOIN 
    superhero AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.alignment_id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id;

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignments,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS marvel_comics_count
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad_alignment
FROM 
    alignment AS T1
JOIN 
    superhero AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.alignment_id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id), 2) AS percentage_bad,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS marvel_count
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T1.alignment = 'Bad' OR T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_marvel_bad
FROM 
    alignment AS T1
JOIN 
    superhero AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.alignment_id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id

JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE superhero.height_cm BETWEEN 150 AND 180;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.publisher_id = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_marvel
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.height_cm BETWEEN 150 AND 180;

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_marvel
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.height_cm BETWEEN 150 AND 180;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_marvel_comics
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.height_cm BETWEEN 150 AND 180;

SELECT s.full_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'strength'
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id

WHERE ha.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
                           FROM hero_attribute ha2

                           WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'strength')
AND a.attribute_name = 'strength';

)

SELECT 
    c_eye.colour AS eye_colour,
    c_hair.colour AS hair_colour,
    c_skin.colour AS skin_colour
FROM 
    superhero s
JOIN 
    gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN 
    colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id
JOIN 
    colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id
JOIN 
    colour c_skin ON s.skin_colour_id = c_skin.id
JOIN 
    publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE 
    g.gender = 'Female'
    AND p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics';

INNER JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Black'
INNER JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Black';

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
INNER JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Black'
INNER JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Black';

SELECT DISTINCT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
JOIN colour c ON ha.attribute_value = c.id
WHERE a.attribute_name IN ('Eye Colour', 'Hair Colour')
AND c.colour = 'Black'
GROUP BY s.superhero_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.attribute_name) = 2;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.superhero_name
FROM superhero AS T1
INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.eye_colour_id
INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.hair_colour_id
WHERE T2.colour = 'Black' AND T3.colour = 'Black';
775:
SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name)) * 100 AS percentage_blue_females
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.gender_id IN (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female');

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' AND T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(T1.gender) AS percentage_blue_female_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.gender_id = 2;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE T1.gender = 'Female' AND T2.colour = 'Blue') AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    heroine AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.superhero_name)) * 100 AS percentage
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female');

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.skin_colour_id IN (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'Blue') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
WHERE T2.gender = 'Female'

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' AND T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS percentage_blue_female_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'Female';

SELECT CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id JOIN gender AS T4 ON T1.gender_id = T4.id WHERE T3.colour = 'Blue' AND T4.gender = 'Female') AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T2.gender = 'Female')

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero s JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id WHERE g.gender = 'Female'))) AS percentage
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND c.colour = 'Blue'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_male,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_female,
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS ratio
FROM 
    superhero;

    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_male,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_female,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN gender_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + 1) AS ratio
FROM 
    superhero;

    COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS difference

    (T1.weight_kg IS NULL OR T1.weight_kg = 0)

    CASE 
        WHEN Reputation > ( SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon' ) THEN 'Harlan'
        ELSE 'Jarrod Dixon'
    END AS HigherReputationUser

ORDER BY 
    Reputation DESC;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%' || tags.TagName || '%'
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE tags.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY posts.Title, comments.Text;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount) AS AverageViewCount, posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%<humor>%'
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId;
SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount), p.Title, c.Text FROM posts AS p JOIN tags AS t ON p.Tags LIKE '%<humor>%' JOIN comments AS c ON p.Id = c.PostId GROUP BY p.Id, p.Title, c.Text

SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AvgViewCount, p.Title, c.Text
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN postTags ON posts.Id = postTags.PostId
JOIN tags ON postTags.TagId = tags.Id
LEFT JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId AND comments.CommentType = 1 -- Assuming 1 represents a comment type
WHERE tags.TagName = '<humor>'

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN postTags ON posts.Id = postTags.PostId
JOIN tags ON postTags.TagId = tags.Id
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE tags.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY posts.Title;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%' || tags.TagName || '%'
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE tags.TagName = 'humor'
GROUP BY posts.Id;

SELECT p.Title, c.Text, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AvgViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' + t.TagName + '%'
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = 'humor'
GROUP BY p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT p.Title, c.Text, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AvgViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' + t.TagName + '%'
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = 'humor'
GROUP BY p.Id, p.Title, c.Text;

FROM comments c
JOIN postHistory ph ON c.UserId = ph.UserId
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?' AND p.Id = ph.PostId;

FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId AND ph.PostId = p.Id
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?' AND ph.postHistoryTypeId = 4;

SELECT c.Text, c.CreationDate
FROM comments c
JOIN postHistory ph ON c.UserId = ph.UserId AND c.PostId = ph.PostId
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?' AND p.Id = ph.PostId;

FROM comments c
JOIN postHistory ph ON c.PostId = ph.PostId AND ph.UserId = c.UserId
JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?' AND ph.PostHistoryTypeId = 4;

JOIN users AS T3 ON T2.UserId = T3.Id

604:
SELECT 
    AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    u.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT 
    AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE 
    p.OwnerUserId IN (
        SELECT 
            OwnerUserId
        FROM 
            posts
        GROUP BY 
            OwnerUserId
        HAVING 
            COUNT(*) > 10
    );

SELECT AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (
    SELECT OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    GROUP BY OwnerUserId
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
)

SELECT 
    AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AvgUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AvgAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    u.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT 
    AVG(users.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(users.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users
JOIN 
    posts ON users.Id = posts.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    users.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(posts.Id) > 10;

SELECT AVG(T2.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(T2.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM posts AS T1
JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id
GROUP BY T2.Id
HAVING COUNT(T1.Id) > 10;

SELECT AVG(T1.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(T1.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM users AS T1
JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId
WHERE COUNT(T2.Id) OVER (PARTITION BY T1.Id) > 10;

WITH UserPosts AS (
    SELECT OwnerUserId, COUNT(Id) AS PostCount
    FROM posts
    GROUP BY OwnerUserId
    HAVING COUNT(Id) > 10
)
SELECT 
    AVG(users.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(users.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users
JOIN 
    UserPosts ON users.Id = UserPosts.OwnerUserId;

SELECT AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AvgUpVotes, AVG(u.Age) AS AvgAge
FROM users u
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM posts p
  WHERE p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
  GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
  HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
);
595:
SELECT u.UserId, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostId IN (
    SELECT ph.PostId
    FROM postHistory ph
    GROUP BY ph.PostId
    HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1
)
AND p.Views >= 1000;

SELECT DISTINCT uh.UserId
FROM postHistory AS uh
JOIN posts AS p ON uh.PostId = p.Id
WHERE uh.UserId IN (
    SELECT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory AS ph
    GROUP BY ph.PostId
    HAVING COUNT(ph.Id) = 1
)
AND p.Views >= 1000;

SELECT u.OwnerUserId, u.DisplayName, COUNT(ph.PostId) AS PostHistoryCount
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY u.OwnerUserId, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1;

SELECT p.OwnerUserId AS UserId
FROM posts p
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.Id) = 1 AND p.Views >= 1000;

SELECT p.OwnerUserId AS UserId
FROM posts p
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
WHERE p.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ph.PostId) = 1;

SELECT DISTINCT p.UserId, u.DisplayName
FROM posts AS p
JOIN users AS u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Views >= 1000
AND p.OwnerUserId IN (
    SELECT UserId
    FROM postHistory
    GROUP BY UserId, PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
);

SELECT DISTINCT T1.DisplayName
FROM users AS T1
JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId
JOIN postHistory AS T3 ON T2.Id = T3.PostId
GROUP BY T3.PostId
HAVING COUNT(T3.PostId) = 1 AND T2.Views >= 1000;

WITH PostHistoryCounts AS (
    SELECT
        p.OwnerUserId,
        ph.PostId,
        COUNT(*) AS HistoryCount
    FROM
        posts p
    JOIN
        postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
    GROUP BY
        p.OwnerUserId,
        ph.PostId
)
SELECT
    u.Id,
    u.DisplayName
FROM
    users u
JOIN
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
JOIN
    PostHistoryCounts phc ON u.Id = phc.OwnerUserId AND p.Id = phc.PostId
WHERE
    phc.HistoryCount = 1
    AND p.Views >= 1000;

SELECT p.UserId
FROM posts p
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
GROUP BY p.UserId
HAVING COUNT(ph.PostId) = 1 AND SUM(p.Views) >= 1000;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100) -
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100)) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100)) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) - 1) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges AS T1
WHERE 
    T1.Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) -
     (COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*))) / 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS "percentage_difference"
FROM 
    badges b
WHERE 
    b.Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) - 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges b
WHERE 
    b.Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(Id)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(Id))) * 100 AS PercentageDifference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student';

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010') AS count_2010,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011') AS count_2011,
       ((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010') / COUNT(*)) * 100 - 
        (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011') / COUNT(*)) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student'

FROM posts
JOIN users ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
WHERE users.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
GROUP BY users.DisplayName;

SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) AS TotalViews
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')

       SUM(CASE WHEN u.DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder' THEN p.ViewCount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalViewsNoah
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')

       SUM(CASE WHEN u.DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder' THEN p.ViewCount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalViewsSnyder
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder');

    u.DisplayName,

JOIN 
    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE 
    u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')

    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN u.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' THEN p.ViewCount ELSE 0 END) > 
             SUM(CASE WHEN u.DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder' THEN p.ViewCount ELSE 0 END)
        THEN 'Harvey Motulsky'
        ELSE 'Noah Snyder'
    END AS MorePopularAuthor
FROM 
    posts p

    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t2.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(p.Id) AS percentage
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
JOIN 
    postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN 
    tags t2 ON pt.TagId = t2.Id
WHERE 
    u.DisplayName = 'Community';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t2.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
JOIN 
    posthistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
LEFT JOIN 
    tags t2 ON p.Id = t2.ExcerptPostId AND t2.TagName LIKE '%r%'
WHERE 
    u.DisplayName = 'Community';

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t.TagName LIKE '%r%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(p.Id) AS percentage

    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
JOIN 
    tags t ON t.Id IN (SELECT Id FROM tags WHERE TagName LIKE '%r%')

    u.DisplayName = 'Community'

SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.Tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1) AS Tag
FROM users AS T1
JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 1 n UNION ALL
    SELECT 2 UNION ALL
    SELECT 3 UNION ALL
    SELECT 4 UNION ALL
    SELECT 5 -- Adjust as needed based on expected number of tags per post
) numbers
WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
AND T2.CommentCount = 0

SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(Tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1) AS tag
FROM posts
JOIN (
    SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10
) numbers ON CHAR_LENGTH(Tags) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(Tags, ',', '')) >= numbers.n - 1
WHERE OwnerDisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND CommentCount = 0;

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageAbove50
FROM posts
WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users ORDER BY Reputation DESC LIMIT 1);

WITH InfluentialUserPosts AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM posts
    WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT TOP 1 UserId FROM users ORDER BY Reputation DESC)
),
Counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS TotalPosts,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PostsAbove50
    FROM InfluentialUserPosts
)
SELECT 
    CAST(PostsAbove50 AS REAL) * 100 / TotalPosts AS PercentageAbove50
FROM Counts;

SELECT name, convertedManaCost
FROM cards
WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper')
ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT name, convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper') ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(convertedManaCost) = (SELECT convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name = 'Serra Angel') THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS card_with_more_converted_mana_cost;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN c1.convertedManaCost > c2.convertedManaCost THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS card_with_more_converted_mana,
    c1.convertedManaCost AS serra_angel_cost,
    c2.convertedManaCost AS shrine_keeper_cost
FROM 
    cards c1
JOIN 
    cards c2
ON 
    c1.id = 1 -- Assuming 'Serra Angel' has an ID of 1
WHERE 
    c2.name = 'Shrine Keeper';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(convertedManaCost) = (SELECT convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name = 'Serra Angel') THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS card_with_higher_cost;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(convertedManaCost) = (SELECT convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name = 'Serra Angel') THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS CardWithHigherCMC
FROM 
    cards
WHERE 
    name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper');

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN c1.convertedManaCost > c2.convertedManaCost THEN c1.name
        ELSE c2.name
    END AS card_with_more_converted_mana
FROM 
    cards c1
JOIN 
    cards c2 ON c2.id = 1 -- Assuming 'Shrine Keeper' has an ID of 1
WHERE 
    c1.name = 'Serra Angel';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN name = 'Serra Angel' THEN convertedManaCost ELSE NULL END) > 
             MAX(CASE WHEN name = 'Shrine Keeper' THEN convertedManaCost ELSE NULL END) 
        THEN 'Serra Angel'
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS card_with_more_converted_mana_cost;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN convertedManaCost > (SELECT convertedManaCost FROM cards WHERE name = 'Shrine Keeper') THEN name
        ELSE 'Shrine Keeper'
    END AS result
FROM 
    cards
WHERE 
    name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper')

FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.label = '+' AND T2.bond_type = '-';

FROM molecule AS T1

WHERE T1.label = '+'

FROM molecule

To answer the question "Which type of label is the most numerous in atoms with hydrogen?", we need to follow these steps:

1. **Identify Atoms with Hydrogen**: We need to find all atoms where the element is 'H'.
2. **Find Molecules Containing These Atoms**: Once we have the atoms with hydrogen, we need to identify the molecules that contain these atoms.
3. **Determine Labels of These Molecules**: For each molecule found in step 2, we need to determine its label.
4. **Count the Frequency of Each Label**: We need to count how many times each label appears among the molecules identified in step 2.
5. **Find the Most Frequent Label**: Finally, we need to find the label that appears most frequently.

Let's break down each step into SQL queries:

1. **Identify Atoms with Hydrogen**:
   ```sql
   SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'H';
   ```

2. **Find Molecules Containing These Atoms**:
   ```sql
   SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'H');
   ```

3. **Determine Labels of These Molecules**:
   ```sql
   SELECT T1.label FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.element = 'H';
   ```

4. **Count the Frequency of Each Label**:
   ```sql
   SELECT T1.label, COUNT(T1.label) AS frequency
   FROM molecule AS T1
   JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
   WHERE T2.element = 'H'
   GROUP BY T1.label;
   ```

5. **Find the Most Frequent Label**:
   ```sql
   SELECT T1.label, COUNT(T1.label) AS frequency
   FROM molecule AS T1
   JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
   WHERE T2.element = 'H'
   GROUP BY T1.label
   ORDER BY frequency DESC
   LIMIT 1;
   ```

Let's break down the problem step-by-step:

1. **Identify the Molecule**: We need to focus on the molecule with the ID 'TR010'.
2. **Find Bond Types**: We need to find all bond types associated with this molecule.
3. **Determine Majority Bond Type**: We need to determine which bond type appears most frequently among those associated with the molecule.
4. **Check Carcinogenicity**: We need to check if the molecule is marked as carcinogenic in the `molecule` table.

Here's how we can achieve each of these steps using SQL queries:

### Step 1: Identify the Molecule
We start by selecting the molecule with the ID 'TR010' from the `molecule` table.

```sql
SELECT * FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010';
```

### Step 2: Find Bond Types
Next, we join the `bond` table with the `molecule` table to get all bond types associated with the molecule 'TR010'.

```sql
SELECT bond_type 
FROM bond 
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id 
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010';
```

### Step 3: Determine Majority Bond Type
To determine the majority bond type, we group the bond types and count their occurrences, then order them by the count in descending order and select the top one.

```sql
SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS count 
FROM bond 
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id 
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;
```

### Step 4: Check Carcinogenicity
Finally, we check if the molecule 'TR010' is marked as carcinogenic in the `molecule` table.

```sql
SELECT carcinogenic 
FROM molecule 
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010';
```

Combining these steps into a single query to get both the majority bond type and whether the molecule is carcinogenic:

```sql
SELECT 
    (SELECT bond_type 
     FROM bond 
     JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id 
     WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010'
     GROUP BY bond_type
     ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS majority_bond_type,
    
    (SELECT carcinogenic 
     FROM molecule 
     WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010') AS is_carcinogenic;
```

This query will return the bond type that accounts for the majority of the bonds in the molecule 'TR010' along with its carcinogenic status.

SELECT T1.bond_type, T2.is_carcinogenic,
       COUNT(T1.bond_type) OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(T1.bond_type) DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rank
FROM bond AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.label = 'TR010'
LIMIT 1;

JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.label != '-'
ORDER BY m.molecule_id ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM connected AS T1 
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id 
WHERE (T1.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T1.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS bond_count
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id
WHERE T1.label = 'TR009' AND (T2.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T3.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS bond_count
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS T4 ON T3.bond_id = T4.bond_id
WHERE (T4.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T4.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connected AS T1 JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE (T1.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T1.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12') AND T1.molecule_id = 'TR009'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_id) AS num_bonds_involved
FROM molecule AS T1
