INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
WHERE (T3.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T3.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12');

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T1.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bond_count
FROM connected AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id AND T1.atom_id != T2.atom_id
JOIN bond AS B ON T1.bond_id = B.bond_id;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS bond_count
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS T3 ON T3.bond_id = T2.bond_id
WHERE T1.label = 'TR009'
AND (T3.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T3.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS num_bonds
FROM molecule AS T1

JOIN bond AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS T4 ON T3.bond_id = T4.bond_id
WHERE T1.label = 'TR009' AND (T4.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T4.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_id) + COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS total_bonds
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id

FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM atom AS T1
    JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
    WHERE T1.element = 'i'
) AS T1;

WHERE b.bond_type = '-';

JOIN connected c ON b.molecule_id = c.molecule_id AND b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';

SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';

SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';
SELECT T3.element FROM connected AS T1 JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id JOIN atom AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'
SELECT T3.element FROM bond AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id JOIN atom AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';

SELECT DISTINCT T1.element
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
WHERE T3.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';
SELECT t2.element FROM connected AS t1 JOIN atom AS t2 ON t1.atom_id = t2.atom_id WHERE t1.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'

SELECT DISTINCT T3.element
FROM bond AS T1
INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
INNER JOIN atom AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id
WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'
260:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.atom_id)
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE (T2.element = 'p' OR T2.element = 'br') AND T3.bond_type = '#';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id)
FROM molecule AS T1
WHERE T1.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT T3.molecule_id
    FROM atom AS T2
    JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
    WHERE (T2.element = 'p' OR T2.element = 'br')
)
AND T1.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT T5.molecule_id
    FROM bond AS T4
    JOIN molecule AS T5 ON T4.molecule_id = T5.molecule_id
    WHERE T4.bond_type = '#'
);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.atom_id) FROM bond AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#' AND T2.element IN ('p', 'br')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) AS total_atoms
FROM atom AS T1
INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE (T1.element IN ('p', 'br')) AND (T3.bond_type = '#')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id)
FROM molecule AS m
JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN ('p', 'br') OR b.bond_type = '#'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.atom_id
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
JOIN molecule AS T4 ON T3.molecule_id = T4.molecule_id
WHERE (T1.element = 'P' OR T1.element = 'Br')
AND T3.bond_type = '#';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T4.element) FROM connected AS T2 JOIN bond AS T1 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id JOIN atom AS T4 ON T4.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#' AND T1.molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element IN ('p', 'br'));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN atom AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '#' AND (T3.element = 'p' OR T3.element = 'br')

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(atom.atom_id) AS percentage
FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '+'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.element) AS percentage
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.label = '+'

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.element) AS percentage

    molecule AS T1
JOIN 
    atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE

    molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id

SELECT

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.label)

JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id

327:
SELECT T1.label
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(a.atom_id) > 5;
SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '-' GROUP BY T1.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5

SELECT T1.label, T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
HAVING T1.label = '-' AND COUNT(DISTINCT T2.atom_id) > 5;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.label = '-'
GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5;

SELECT T1.molecule_id
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.label = '-'
GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(T2.molecule_id) > 5;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN connected AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id GROUP BY T1.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.atom_id) > 5 AND T1.label = '-'

SELECT m.label, m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '-'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM atom a
    JOIN molecule mol ON a.molecule_id = mol.molecule_id
    GROUP BY mol.molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(a.atom_id) > 5
    AND mol.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  );

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(a.atome_id) > 5
AND m.label = '-'
281:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM atom AS T1 
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id 
WHERE T2.label = '+' AND SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+'
AND ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) = 3;

SELECT COUNT(T1.element) AS element_count, T1.element
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.label = '+' AND SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'
GROUP BY T1.element;

SELECT element, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+'
AND SUBSTR(a.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'
GROUP BY element;

SELECT COUNT(a.element) AS toxicology_element_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE m.label = '+'
AND SUBSTR(a.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.element) AS toxicology_element_count
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
JOIN molecule AS T4 ON T1.molecule_id = T4.molecule_id
WHERE T4.label = '+'
AND SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4';

SELECT t1.element
FROM atom AS t1
JOIN molecule AS t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS t3 ON t1.atom_id = t3.atom_id
JOIN bond AS t4 ON t3.bond_id = t4.bond_id
WHERE t2.label = '+' AND t1.atom_id IN (
    SELECT atom_id
    FROM atom
    JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
    WHERE molecule.label = '+'
    ORDER BY atom_id
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.element) AS toxicology_count
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T4 ON T3.bond_id = T4.bond_id
WHERE T2.label = '+' AND SUBSTR(T2.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4';

    atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id

    m.molecule_id = 'TR006'

17:
SELECT s.CharterNumber
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.AvgScrWrite > 499
ORDER BY f.AvgScrWrite DESC;
SELECT s.CharterNumber FROM frpm AS f JOIN schools AS s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.AvgScrWrite > 499 ORDER BY f.AvgScrWrite DESC;

SELECT s.CharterNumber, f.AvgScrWrite
FROM frpm AS f
JOIN schools AS s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.AvgScrWrite > 499
ORDER BY f.AvgScrWrite DESC;

SELECT s.CharterNum, f.AvgScrWrite
FROM frpm AS f
JOIN schools AS s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY f.AvgScrWrite DESC;

SELECT s.CharterNum, f.CDSCode
FROM satscores AS f
JOIN schools AS s ON f.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY f.AvgScrWrite DESC;

SELECT s.CharterNumber, f.AvgScrWrite
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNumber IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY f.AvgScrWrite DESC;

SELECT schools.CharterNum
FROM frpm
INNER JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND schools.CharterNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY frpm.AvgScrWrite DESC;

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T2.AvgScrWrite DESC) AS Rank,
    T1.CharterNum
FROM 
    schools AS T1
JOIN 
    frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND T1.CharterNum IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT T2.CharterNum, AVG(T1.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore
FROM satscores AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.AvgScrWrite > 499
ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC;

JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` > 800 AND T1.`County Name` = 'Monterey'
12:
SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE ("NumGE1500" / "NumTstTakr") > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`) AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(T1.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)`) AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS max_eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 > 0 AND s.NumTstTakr > 0 AND (s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
INNER JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE (frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" / frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE ("NumGE1500" / "NumTstTakr") > 0.3;

SELECT DISTINCT s.School, s.FundingType
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ss ON f.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE f.County = 'Riverside' AND ss.AvgScrMath > 400;

SELECT s.FundingType
FROM schools AS s
JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY s.School
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400;

SELECT DISTINCT T3.School, T3.FundingType
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode
WHERE T3.County = 'Riverside'
AND T2.AvgScrMath > 400;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.FundingType

JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T1.County = 'Riverside' AND T2.AvgScrMath > 400;

SELECT T2.School, T2.FundingType

JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode
WHERE T3.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY T2.School, T2.FundingType

SELECT DISTINCT s.School, s.FundingType

SELECT s.School, s.FundingType

WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'

SELECT DISTINCT T3.FundingType

SELECT s.School, s.FundingType

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore,
    s.Phone
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY 
    s.School, s.Phone;

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.Phone, 
    AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY 
    s.School, 
    s.Phone;

SELECT T2.sname AS SchoolName, AVG(T2.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore, T1.Phone AS CommunicationNumber
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE (T1.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR T1.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY T2.sname, T1.Phone;

SELECT AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite), schools.School, schools.Phone
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE (YEAR(schools.OpenDate) > 1991 OR YEAR(schools.ClosedDate) < 2000)
GROUP BY schools.School, schools.Phone;

SELECT 
    s.School AS School_Name,
    s.Phone AS Communication_Number,
    AVG(f.AvgScrWrite) AS Average_Writing_Score
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY 
    s.School, s.Phone;

SELECT T1.School, AVG(T2.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgSATScoreWrite, T1.Phone
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE (T1.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR T1.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY T1.School, T1.Phone;

SELECT AVG(frpm.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore, schools.School, schools.Phone
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE schools.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR schools.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01'
GROUP BY schools.School, schools.Phone;

SELECT AVG(frpm.AvgScrWrite), schools.School, schools.Phone
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE (YEAR(schools.OpenDate) > 1991 OR YEAR(schools.ClosedDate) < 2000)
GROUP BY schools.School, schools.Phone;

SELECT 
    T2.School AS "School Name",
    AVG(T1.AvgScrWrite) AS "Average Writing Score",
    T2.Phone AS "Phone Number"
FROM 
    satscores AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    (T2.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR T2.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY 
    T2.School, T2.Phone;

SELECT 
    CDSCode, 
    (Free Meal Count (K-12)) / (Enrollment (K-12)) AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM 
    frpm
ORDER BY 
    Enrollment (K-12) DESC
LIMIT 
    10, 2;

SELECT "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 1, 1;

SELECT 
    (frpm."Free Meal Count (K-12)" / frpm."Enrollment (K-12)") AS "Eligible Free Rate",
    frpm."School Name"
FROM 
    frpm
WHERE 
    frpm."Low Grade" = '1' AND frpm."High Grade" = '12'
ORDER BY 
    frpm."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" AS "Eligible Free Rate"
FROM frpm
WHERE "Low Grade" = '1' AND "High Grade" = '12'
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9;
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm WHERE "Low Grade" = '1' AND "High Grade" = '12' ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9;

SELECT ROUND("Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)", 2) AS "Eligible Free Rate"
FROM frpm
WHERE "Educational Option Type" = '10th & 11th'
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 8;

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Low Grade] = '1' AND f.[High Grade] = '12'
ORDER BY 
    f.[Enrollment (K-12)] DESC
OFFSET 9 ROWS FETCH NEXT 2 ROWS ONLY;

SELECT 
    CDSCode,
    Enrollment(`Enrollment (K-12)`),
    FreeMealCount(`Free Meal Count (K-12)`),
    (FreeMealCount(`Free Meal Count (K-12)`) / Enrollment(`Enrollment (K-12)`) * 100) AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM 
    frpm
ORDER BY 
    Enrollment(`Enrollment (K-12)`) DESC
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9;

SELECT T2.School, T1.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)]
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.[Enrollment (K-12)] > 0
ORDER BY T1.[Enrollment (K-12)] DESC
OFFSET 9 ROWS FETCH NEXT 2 ROWS ONLY;

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31';

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31'
AND schools.City = 'Fresno';

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE YEAR(schools.OpenDate) = 1980;

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', schools.OpenDate) = '1980';

SELECT AVG(s.AvgScrRead + s.AvgScrMath + s.AvgScrWrite) / 3 AS avg_test_takers
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31';

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr) AS avg_test_takers
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31';

SELECT AVG(s.NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers
FROM schools AS s
JOIN satscores AS sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE s.City = 'Fresno' AND STRFTIME('%Y', s.OpenDate) = '1980';

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.State, s.Zip

SELECT 
    T2.AdmFName1, 
    T2.AdmLName1, 
    T2.AdmFName2, 
    T2.AdmLName2, 
    T2.AdmFName3, 
    T2.AdmLName3
FROM 
    satscores AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)

SELECT s.AdmFName1, s.AdmLName1, s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2, s.AdmFName3, s.AdmLName3
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores sa ON f.CDSCode = sa.cds
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE sa.NumGE1500 >= 1500
ORDER BY sa.NumGE1500 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    t2.AdmFName1, 
    t2.AdmLName1, 
    t2.AdmFName2, 
    t2.AdmLName2, 
    t2.AdmFName3, 
    t2.AdmLName3
FROM 
    satscores AS t1
JOIN 
    schools AS t2 ON t1.cds = t2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    t1.NumGE1500 >= 1500
GROUP BY 
    t2.CDSCode
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(t1.cds) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    s.AdmFName1, 
    s.AdmLName1, 
    s.AdmFName2, 
    s.AdmLName2, 
    s.AdmFName3, 
    s.AdmLName3 
FROM 
    frpm f 
JOIN 
    satscores sa ON f.CDSCode = sa.cds 
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode 
WHERE 
    sa.NumGE1500 > 0 
GROUP BY 
    f.CDSCode 
ORDER BY 
    SUM(sa.NumGE1500) DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.AdmFName1, T2.AdmLName1, T2.AdmFName2, T2.AdmLName2, T2.AdmFName3, T2.AdmLName3
FROM satscores AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.NumGE1500 > 0
GROUP BY T2.School
ORDER BY COUNT(T1.NumGE1500) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    AdmFName1, AdmLName1,
    AdmFName2, AdmLName2,
    AdmFName3, AdmLName3
FROM 
    schools AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    satscores AS T2
ON 
    T1.CDSCode = T2.cds

    T2.NumGE1500 >= 1;

SELECT T1.AdmFName1, T1.AdmLName1, T1.AdmEmail1
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T2.NumGE1500 > 0

SELECT T1.AdmFName1, T1.AdmMName1, T1.AdmLName1
FROM schools AS T1
INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds

    T1.School,
    T1.AdmFName1, 
    T1.AdmLName1, 
    T1.AdmEmail1, 
    T1.AdmFName2, 
    T1.AdmLName2, 
    T1.AdmEmail2, 
    T1.AdmFName3, 
    T1.AdmLName3,

    T1.AdmEmail2, 
    T1.AdmFName3, 
    T1.AdmLName3, 
    T1.AdmEmail3

    COUNT(T2.NumGE1500) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T2.School AS SchoolName,
    T2.County AS CountyName,
    T2.District AS DistrictName,
    T1.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / T1.[Enrollment (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.[OwnershipCode] = 66
ORDER BY 
    EligibleFreeRate DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT "School Name", "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", "FRPM Count (K-12)"
FROM frpm
WHERE "Low Grade" = 'K' AND "High Grade" = '12'
ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT TOP 5 
    f.CDSCode, 
    f.School Name, 
    f.County Name, 
    f.District Name, 
    f.FRPM Count (K-12), 
    f.Enrollment (K-12), 
    (f.FRPM Count (K-12) / f.Enrollment (K-12)) AS EligibleFreeOrReducedPriceMealRate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.OwnershipCode = 66
ORDER BY 
    f.FRPM Count (K-12) DESC;

SELECT TOP 5 
    (f."FRPM Count (K-12)" / f."Enrollment (K-12)") AS "Eligible Free or Reduced Price Meal Rate",
    s.School,
    f."FRPM Count (K-12)",
    f."Enrollment (K-12)"
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s."Ownership Code" = '66'
ORDER BY 
    f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC;

SELECT 
    f.School Code, 
    f.School Name, 
    f.County Name, 
    f.District Name, 
    f.Enrollment AS Enrollment_K12, 
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] AS FRPM_Count_K12, 
    (f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) * 100 AS Eligible_Free_Reduced_Price_Rate_K12
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.OwnerCode = 66
ORDER BY 
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
    T2.School, 
    T1.[FRPM Count (K-12)], 
    T1.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeOrReducedPriceMealRate
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.[Low Grade] = 'K' AND T1.[High Grade] = '12'
    AND T2.Owner = 66
ORDER BY 
    T1.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    f.School AS School,
    f.County AS County,
    f.District AS District,
    f.School AS School,
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] AS FRPM_Count,
    f.[Enrollment (K-12)] AS Enrollment,
    (f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) AS Eligibility_Rate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Charter School (Y/N)] = 0 AND
    f.[Ownership Code] = '66'
ORDER BY 
    Eligibility_Rate DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT frpm.CDSCode, frpm.School, frpm.County, frpm.District, frpm.School_Name, frpm.FRPM_Count_K_12, frpm.Enrollment_K_12, frpm.Percent_Eligible_FRPM_K_12, frpm.Charter_School_Number, frpm.Charter_Funding_Type, frpm.IRC, frpm.Low_Grade, frpm.High_Grade, frpm.FRPM_Count_K_12 / frpm.Enrollment_K_12 AS Eligibility_Rate
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.Charter_School = 66
ORDER BY Eligibility_Rate DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT TOP 5 
    f.School Name, 
    f.County Name, 
    f.District Name, 
    f.School Type, 
    f.Educational Option Type, 
    f.NSLP Provision Status, 
    f.Charter School (Y/N), 
    f.Charter School Number, 
    f.Charter Funding Type, 
    f.IRC, 
    f.Low Grade, 
    f.High Grade, 
    f.Enrollment (K-12), 
    f.Free Meal Count (K-12), 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)], 
    f.FRPM Count (K-12), 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)], 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)], 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)], 
    f.[2013-14 CALPADS Fall 1 Certification Status], 
    f.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)], 
    f.[Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)], 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)], 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] AS 'Eligibility Rate (K-12)' 
FROM 
    frpm f 
INNER JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode 
WHERE 
    f.[Charter School (Y/N)] = 66 
ORDER BY 
    f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC;

SELECT 
    T2.School, 
    T2.DOCType,
    (T2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` - AVG(T2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) OVER()) AS diff_from_avg
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
HAVING 
    diff_from_avg > 0;

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOC, 
    s.DOCType
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE 
    ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`)) AS avg_diff
        FROM 
            frpm f2
    )

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOCType, 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] - f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)] AS Difference
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
HAVING 
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] - f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)] > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] - f.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)])
        FROM 
            frpm f
        JOIN 
            schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
        WHERE 
            s.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
    )

SELECT T2.School, T2.DOC, AVG(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS avg_diff FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > AVG(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) GROUP BY avg_diff;

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOCType 
FROM 
    frpm f 
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode 
WHERE 
    f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)] > 
    AVG(f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) OVER ()

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.DOC,
    s.DOCType
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.FundingType = 'Local' AND
    ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
        FROM 
            frpm f2
        JOIN 
            schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
        WHERE 
            s2.FundingType = 'Local'
    )

SELECT 
    T2.School AS SchoolName,
    T2.DOCType AS DOCType
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) 
        FROM 
            frpm AS T1
    )

SELECT schools.School, schools.DOCType
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE (frpm.Enrollment - frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > (
    SELECT AVG(Enrollment - "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)")
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Charter School" = 0 AND "FundingType" = 'Local'
);

WITH local_schools AS (
    SELECT f.CDSCode, f.School Name, f.County Name, f.District Name, f.School Type, f.FundingType,
           (f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS Difference
    FROM frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE f.FundingType = 'Local'
),
average_difference AS (
    SELECT AVG(Difference) AS AvgDiff
    FROM local_schools
)
SELECT ls.School Name, ls.DocType, ls.County Name, ls.District Name, ls.School Type, ls.Difference
FROM local_schools ls
JOIN average_difference ad ON ls.Difference > ad.AvgDiff;

SELECT T2.School, T2.County, T2.District, SUM(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` + T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T2.Doc = '31'
GROUP BY T2.School, T2.County, T2.District
ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.School, SUM(f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.DOC = 31
GROUP BY s.School
ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T2.County, 
    T2.District, 
    T2.School, 
    T1.Enrollment AS TotalEnrollment
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.DOC = 31
ORDER BY 
    T1.Enrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.School, T2.[Enrollment (K-12)] 
FROM schools AS T1 
INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode 
WHERE T1.DOC = 31 
ORDER BY T2.[Enrollment (K-12)] DESC

SELECT T1.School, SUM(T2.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.DOC = 31

SELECT T1.School, T1.County, T1.District, T1.State, T2.Enrollment FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.DOC = 31 AND T2.[Enrollment (K-12)] > 0 ORDER BY T2.[Enrollment (K-12)] DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.State, SUM(T2.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode

SELECT T1.School, SUM(T2.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS TotalEnrollment
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.DOC = 31
GROUP BY T1.School
ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC

SELECT s.School, s.County, s.District, f.[Enrollment (K-12)]

SELECT s.School, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'
GROUP BY s.School;

SELECT s.School, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'
GROUP BY s.School;

SELECT 
    s.School AS School_Name,
    AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS Average_Writing_Score

    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'
GROUP BY 
    s.School;

SELECT 
    schools.School AS SchoolName,
    AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore

    schools.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND schools.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'

WHERE (s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich') OR s.AdmEmail1 LIKE '%Ricci Ulrich%'

JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'

SELECT

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    s.State,
    AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    s.School, s.County, s.State
HAVING 
    Rank <= 5;

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    s.School, s.County
HAVING 
    RANK <= 5;

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    s.County,
    Rank;

SELECT T2.School, T2.County, T2.District, T2.Virtual, T1.AvgScrRead, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.County ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY T2.County, Rank;

WITH RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT s.School, s.County, ss.AvgScrRead,
           RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) as rank
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
)
SELECT School, County, AvgScrRead
FROM RankedSchools
WHERE rank <= 5;

WITH RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT s.School, s.County, AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore,
           RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS Rank
    FROM schools AS s
    JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
)
SELECT School FROM RankedSchools WHERE Rank <= 5;

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    s.District,
    s.Street,
    s.City,
    s.Zip,
    s.State,
    s.MailStreet,
    s.MailCity,
    s.MailZip,
    s.MailState,
    s.Phone,
    s.Ext,
    s.Website,
    s.OpenDate,
    s.ClosedDate,
    s.Charter,
    s.CharterNum,
    s.FundingType,
    s.DOC,
    s.DOCType,
    s.SOC,
    s.SOCType,
    s.EdOpsCode,
    s.EdOpsName,
    s.EILCode,
    s.EILName,
    s.GSoffered,
    s.GSserved,
    s.Virtual,
    s.Magnet,
    s.Latitude,
    s.Longitude,
    s.AdmFName1,
    s.AdmLName1,
    s.AdmEmail1,
    s.AdmFName2,
    s.AdmLName2,
    s.AdmEmail2,
    s.AdmFName3,
    s.AdmLName3,
    s.AdmEmail3,
    s.LastUpdate,
    ss.AvgScrRead AS AverageReadingScore,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS RankWithinCounty
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    s.County,
    RankWithinCounty
LIMIT 5;

WITH RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT
        s.School,
        s.County,
        s.NCESDist,
        s.NCESSchool,
        ss.AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        schools s
    JOIN
        satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE
        s.Virtual = 'F'
)
SELECT
    School,
    County,
    NCESDist,
    NCESSchool,
    AvgScrRead
FROM
    RankedSchools
WHERE
    rn <= 5;

WITH RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.CDSCode, 
        s.School, 
        ss.AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank
    FROM schools AS s
    JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
)
SELECT School
FROM RankedSchools
WHERE rank <= 5;

    SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio

    schools

    County = 'Orange' AND 
    (ClosedDate IS NULL OR ClosedDate > CURRENT_DATE);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools AS s
JOIN frpm AS f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles' AND s.Charter = 0 AND f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalNonCharteredSchools
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.Charter = 0
AND frpm.County = 'Los Angeles'
AND (frpm.[Free Meal Count (K-12)] * 100 / frpm.[Enrollment (K-12)]) < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18 AND T1.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 0 AND T2.County = 'Los Angeles';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.Charter = 0 
AND schools.County = 'Los Angeles' 
AND (frpm.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` * 100 / frpm.`Enrollment (K-12)`) < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles' AND schools.Charter = 0 AND frpm.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)] < 0.18;

WHERE schools.Charter = 0

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Charter = 0 AND T1.County = 'Los Angeles' AND (T2.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` * 100 / T2.`Enrollment (K-12)`) < 0.18

    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND f.LowGrade <= 'K' AND f.HighGrade >= '9'
    AND f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] IS NOT NULL

    T2.School, 
    (T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` * 100) AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)"
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.County = 'Los Angeles' 
    AND T2.GSoffered LIKE '%Kindergarten%' 
    AND T2.GSoffered LIKE '%9th Grade%'

SELECT COUNT(s.CDSCode), f.CountyName
FROM frpm AS f
JOIN schools AS s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.CountyName IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') AND s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY f.CountyName
ORDER BY COUNT(s.CDSCode) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f.County, COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
AND f.County BETWEEN 'San Diego' AND 'Santa Barbara'
GROUP BY f.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.County, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')
AND T1.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f.County, COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfNonPhysicalSchools
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f.County BETWEEN 'San Diego' AND 'Santa Barbara'
AND s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY f.County
ORDER BY NumberOfNonPhysicalSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.County, COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY s.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.County, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F'
AND T2.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY T2.County
ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.County, COUNT(*) FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F' AND T2.County BETWEEN 'San Diego' AND 'Santa Barbara' GROUP BY T2.County ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*), t2.County FROM schools AS t1 JOIN frpm AS t2 ON t1.CDSCode = t2.CDSCode WHERE t1.Virtual = 'F' AND (t2.County = 'San Diego' OR t2.County = 'Santa Barbara') GROUP BY t2.County;
SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools FROM schools WHERE County BETWEEN 'San Diego' AND 'Santa Barbara' AND Virtual = 'F' GROUP BY County ORDER BY NumberOfSchools DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.MailCity) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(T1.CDSCode) AS TotalNumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND (T1.GSoffered LIKE '%K%' OR T1.GSoffered LIKE '%8%') AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT City) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(*) AS TotalSchools
FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.Magnet = 1 AND schools.GSoffered LIKE '%K-8%' AND frpm.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.City), COUNT(T2.School)
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
AND T2.Magnet = 1
AND (T2.GSoffered LIKE '%K%' OR T2.GSoffered LIKE '%8%')
GROUP BY T2.City;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.City) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(T1.School) AS NumberOfSchools
FROM schools AS T1

    COUNT(DISTINCT s.City) AS NumberOfCities

JOIN satscores AS T3 ON T2.CDSCode = T3.cds
WHERE T2.Magnet = 1 AND T2.GSoffered LIKE '%K-8%' AND T1.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'

SELECT COUNT(s.CDSCode) AS NumberOfSchools, s.MailCity AS City

WHERE s.Magnet = 1 AND s.GSoffered = 'K-8' AND f.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.City, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfSchools

JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%K-8%' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'

GROUP BY T1.MailCity;

FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id

SELECT AVG(account.A11) AS average_salary
FROM client
JOIN account ON client.client_id = account.client_id
WHERE client.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client);

SELECT account_id
FROM client
WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client)
ORDER BY A11 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.client_id, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
GROUP BY c.client_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.birth_date IN (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    GROUP BY district_id
)
AND T1.A11 IN (
    SELECT MAX(A11)
    FROM client
    GROUP BY district_id
);

SELECT T1.account_id
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
WHERE T3.birth_date IN (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
)
AND T3.A11 = (
    SELECT MAX(A11)
    FROM client
);

SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
GROUP BY a.account_id, c.birth_date
HAVING AVG(t.amount) = (
    SELECT AVG(t2.amount)
    FROM account a2
    JOIN client c2 ON a2.client_id = c2.client_id
    JOIN trans t2 ON a2.account_id = t2.account_id
    WHERE c2.birth_date <= c.birth_date
    GROUP BY a2.account_id, c2.birth_date
)
ORDER BY MIN(c.birth_date) ASC;

SELECT t2.account_id
FROM client AS t1
JOIN account AS t2 ON t1.client_id = t2.client_id
JOIN trans AS t3 ON t2.account_id = t3.account_id
GROUP BY t1.client_id
ORDER BY AVG(t3.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.account_id
FROM disp d
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id IN (
    SELECT c.client_id
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.birth_date >= (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client)
    GROUP BY c.client_id
    HAVING AVG(c.A11) = (SELECT MAX(avg_salary) FROM (
        SELECT AVG(c.A11) AS avg_salary
        FROM client c
        WHERE c.birth_date >= (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client)
        GROUP BY c.client_id
    ) AS subquery)
);

WITH youngest_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id FROM client WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client)
),
salary_info AS (
    SELECT AVG(disp.A11) AS avg_salary, client.client_id 
    FROM client 
    JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id 
    JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id 
    GROUP BY client.client_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT t2.account_id 
FROM youngest_clients t1 
JOIN account t2 ON t1.client_id = t2.client_id 
JOIN disp t3 ON t2.account_id = t3.account_id 
WHERE t3.A11 = (SELECT MAX(avg_salary) FROM salary_info);

94:
SELECT 
    T2.account_id,
    MAX(T1.A11) - MIN(T1.A11) AS salary_gap
FROM 
    district AS T1
JOIN 
    client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    T2.account_id
ORDER BY 
    T2.birth_date DESC, 
    AVG(T1.A11) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.A11 AS avg_salary_oldest,
    MAX(d.A11) - MIN(d.A11) AS salary_gap
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    district dt ON c.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    c.birth_date ASC;

SELECT 
    MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) AS salary_gap
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district dis ON a.district_id = dis.district_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) / 365);
SELECT MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) AS gap FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F'

SELECT 
    t1.account_id,
    MAX(t3.A11) - MIN(t3.A11) AS salary_gap
FROM 
    account AS t1
JOIN 
    disp AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
JOIN 
    client AS t3 ON t2.client_id = t3.client_id
WHERE 
    t3.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    t1.account_id
ORDER BY 
    t3.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(AverageSalary) AS LowestAverageSalary,
    MAX(AverageSalary) AS HighestAverageSalary,
    MAX(AverageSalary) - MIN(AverageSalary) AS SalaryGap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS AverageSalary,
        DATEDIFF(YEAR, MIN(c.birth_date), GETDATE()) AS Age
    FROM 
        client c
    JOIN 
        trans t ON c.client_id = t.account_id
    WHERE 
        c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        c.client_id, c.birth_date
) AS Subquery
ORDER BY 
    Age DESC, AverageSalary ASC;

SELECT 
    MAX(avg_salary) - MIN(avg_salary) AS salary_gap,
    oldest_client.account_id
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T1.account_id,
        AVG(T3.amount) AS avg_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC) AS rn
    FROM 
        client AS T1
    JOIN 
        account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
    JOIN 
        trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
    WHERE 
        T1.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        T1.account_id
) AS subquery
WHERE 
    subquery.rn = 1;

WITH client_salaries AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary,
        DATE_PART('year', AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
    FROM 
        client c
    JOIN 
        account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
    JOIN 
        trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE 
        c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        c.client_id, c.birth_date
),
oldest_client AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg_salary,
        MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary,
        MIN(age) AS min_age
    FROM 
        client_salaries
)
SELECT 
    cs.account_id,
    os.max_avg_salary - os.min_avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM 
    client_salaries cs
JOIN 
    oldest_client os ON cs.avg_salary = os.min_avg_salary AND cs.age = os.min_age;

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, AVG(a.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
    GROUP BY c.client_id
),
oldest_female_client AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, MIN(c.birth_date) AS min_birth_date
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT fc.client_id, fc.avg_salary
FROM female_clients fc
JOIN oldest_female_client ofc ON fc.client_id = ofc.client_id
ORDER BY fc.avg_salary ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH average_salaries AS (
    SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
    GROUP BY c.client_id
),
salary_stats AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary, MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg_salary
    FROM average_salaries
)
SELECT max_avg_salary - min_avg_salary AS gap
FROM salary_stats;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    disp d ON l.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN 
    account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district dt ON c.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D';

SELECT

JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id

WHERE

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS state_name, ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN loan l ON c.client_id = l.client_id AND l.status = 'D'

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name,

JOIN

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE

GROUP BY

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id

JOIN

JOIN 
    district dis ON a.district_id = dis.district_id

    l.status = 'D';

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district, 
    d.A3 AS state, 
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY 
    d.A2, 
    d.A3;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS District,
    d.A3 AS State,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS Unemployment_Rate_Increment
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id AND l.status = 'D'
WHERE 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM trans t 
        WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id AND t.amount < 0
    )
GROUP BY 
    d.A2, d.A3;

JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T3.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.A2
ORDER BY num_female_clients DESC
LIMIT 9;

FROM account AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.district_id
ORDER BY num_female_account_holders DESC
LIMIT 9;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, COUNT(c.client_id) AS num_female_clients
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY d.district_id

SELECT T3.A2, COUNT(*) as num_female_clients

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id AND t1.date <= '1998-12-27' AND t2.date = '1993-03-22'
WHERE 
    t1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27';

SELECT 
    ((T3.balance - T2.balance) / T2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    account AS T1
JOIN 
    loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    disp AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '1993-07-05'
ORDER BY 
    T2.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) - MIN(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END)) / MIN(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END)) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans t1
JOIN 
    account a ON t1.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE 
    t1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
ORDER BY 
    t1.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ((t2.balance - t3.balance) / t3.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON a.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN 
    trans t3 ON a.account_id = t3.account_id AND t3.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN T3.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27' THEN T3.balance ELSE 0 END) - 
      MIN(CASE WHEN T3.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27' THEN T3.balance ELSE 0 END)) /
     MIN(CASE WHEN T3.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27' THEN T3.balance ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS balance_increase_rate
FROM 
    loan AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.date = '1993-07-05'

SELECT 
    ((T3.balance - T4.balance) / T4.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id AND T3.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN 
    trans AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id AND T4.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    T1.status = 'approved' AND T1.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((T1.balance_at_1993_3_22 - T1.balance_at_1998_12_27) / T1.balance_at_1998_12_27) * 100 AS balance_increase_rate
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        T2.balance AS balance_at_1993_3_22,
        (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = T2.account_id AND date = '1998-12-27') AS balance_at_1998_12_27
     FROM 
        trans AS T2
     JOIN 
        loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
     WHERE 
        T3.date = '1993-07-05'
    ) AS T1;

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance_at_1993_03_22 - t1.balance_at_1998_12_27) / t1.balance_at_1998_12_27) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_at_1993_03_22,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_at_1998_12_27
    FROM 
        client c
    JOIN 
        disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN 
        loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
    JOIN 
        trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE 
        l.date = '1993-07-05'
    GROUP BY 
        c.client_id
) t1;

SELECT d.A2 AS DistrictName, SUM(t.amount) AS TotalWithdrawal
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ'
AND t.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-01-31'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY TotalWithdrawal DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT T3.A2, SUM(T1.amount) AS total_amount
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T1.date LIKE '1996-01%'
GROUP BY T3.A2
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2, SUM(t.amount) AS total_withdrawal
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.date LIKE '1996-01%'
AND t.type = 'VYDAJ'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawal DESC
LIMIT 10;

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ'
AND t.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-01-31'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY withdrawal_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2, SUM(t.amount) as total_withdrawals

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-01-31'

GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawals DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT T3.A2, SUM(T1.amount) AS total_withdrawal

JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_withdrawal

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id

SELECT T3.A2, COUNT(T1.trans_id) AS num_withdrawals

SELECT d.A2, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS withdrawal_count

SELECT DISTINCT t1.account_id
FROM trans AS t1
JOIN card AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
WHERE t1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND t1.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE YEAR(date) = 1998
)

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM disp d
JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND YEAR(t.date) = 1998
AND t.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND YEAR(date) = 1998)

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN card AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
AND T1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND T1.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31' AND operation = 'VYBER KARTOU')

SELECT DISTINCT t.account_id
FROM trans t
JOIN card c ON t.account_id = c.account_id
WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND YEAR(t.date) = 1998
AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE YEAR(date) = 1998
);

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM trans t
JOIN card c ON t.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE t.date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
AND t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND t.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31' AND operation = 'VYBER KARTOU')

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND t.date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
AND t.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31')

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN card AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1998'
AND T1.amount < ( SELECT SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND strftime('%Y', date) = '1998' )

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.date) = 1998
AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 1998
    GROUP BY card.type
);

SELECT DISTINCT account_id

AND YEAR(date) = 1998
AND amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE Operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
    AND YEAR(date) = 1998
);

FROM card c
JOIN disp d ON c.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dis ON a.district_id = dis.district_id
WHERE c.type != 'OWNER'
AND dis.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT c.type
FROM card c
JOIN account a ON c.disp_id = a.disp_id
WHERE c.type NOT IN ('OWNER')
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM district d
    WHERE d.district_id = a.district_id
    AND d.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000
)

SELECT DISTINCT T1.type 
FROM card AS T1 
WHERE T1.type != 'OWNER' 
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM district AS T2 
    WHERE T2.district_id = T1.district_id 
    AND 8000 <= T2.A11 <= 9000
);

SELECT DISTINCT T1.type
FROM card AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id
WHERE T2.client_id NOT IN (
    SELECT T4.client_id
    FROM disp AS T4
    JOIN client AS T5 ON T4.client_id = T5.client_id
    WHERE T5.gender = 'OWNER'
)

UNION

SELECT AVG(T6.A11)
FROM account AS T7
JOIN district AS T6 ON T7.district_id = T6.district_id
WHERE T7.frequency = 'monthly'
AND T6.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT account_id
FROM disp
WHERE account_type != 'OWNER' AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A8 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000
)

SELECT DISTINCT T1.type
FROM card AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.type != 'OWNER' AND 8000 < T3.A11 <= 9000
138:
SELECT COUNT(client_id)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN district ON disp.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(district.date) = 1995
ORDER BY district.A15 DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

SELECT COUNT(client.client_id)
FROM district
JOIN disp ON district.district_id = disp.district_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
WHERE YEAR(district.date) = 1995
ORDER BY district.A15 DESC
LIMIT 1, 1;

SELECT COUNT(client.client_id)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN district ON disp.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 = (
    SELECT A15
    FROM district
    WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M'

SELECT COUNT(client.client_id)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
WHERE disp.district_id IN (
    SELECT district.district_id
    FROM district
    JOIN trans ON district.district_id = trans.district_id
    WHERE strftime('%Y', trans.date) = '1995'
    GROUP BY district.district_id
    ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN trans.type = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M';

SELECT COUNT(client.client_id)
FROM district
JOIN trans ON district.district_id = trans.A15
JOIN client ON trans.account_id = client.account_id
WHERE YEAR(trans.date) = 1995
ORDER BY trans.A15 DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

SELECT COUNT(client_id)
FROM client
JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT A15
    FROM district
    WHERE YEAR(date) = 1995
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M'

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM district d
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE d.district_id IN (
  SELECT district_id
  FROM district
  WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY district_id
  ORDER BY SUM(A15) DESC
  LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
) AND c.gender = 'M';

SELECT COUNT(client.gender)
FROM district
JOIN account ON district.district_id = account.district_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM client.birth_date) = 1995 AND client.gender = 'M'
GROUP BY district.A15
ORDER BY SUM(district.A15) DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

WITH RankedDistricts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.district_id,
        d.A15,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY d.A15 DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        district d
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(c.client_id) AS num_male_clients
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    RankedDistricts rd ON d.district_id = rd.district_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M'
    AND rd.rank = 2;

SELECT AVG(T1.A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T2.date >= '1997-01-01' AND T3.type LIKE '%crim%'
GROUP BY T1.A15
HAVING COUNT(T3.trans_id) > 4000;

SELECT AVG(d.A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE d.A15 > 4000 AND YEAR(a.date) >= 1997;

SELECT AVG(A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM district
WHERE A15 > 4000 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM account
    WHERE account.district_id = district.district_id AND YEAR(account.date) >= 1997
);

SELECT AVG(T3.A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM account AS T1
JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.date >= '1997-01-01' AND T3.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY T2.A3
HAVING COUNT(T3.trans_id) > 4000;
SELECT AVG(T1.A15) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.date LIKE '%/%/1997%' AND T1.A15 > 4000

SELECT AVG(A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01' AND a.date < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY d.district_id
HAVING COUNT(a.account_id) > 0;

SELECT d.A3, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_crimes
FROM district d
JOIN trans t ON d.district_id = t.district_id
WHERE YEAR(t.date) = 1995
GROUP BY d.A3
HAVING SUM(t.amount) > 4000;

SELECT AVG(d.A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE d.A15 > 4000 AND a.date >= '1997-01-01'

SELECT AVG(T3.A15) AS avg_crimes
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN crime AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T3.year = 1995 AND T3.A15 > 4000 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) >= '1997'
GROUP BY T1.A3;

SELECT t.trans_id, t.date, t.amount, t.balance, t.k_symbol, t.bank, t.account
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE c.client_id = 3356 AND t.operation = 'VYBER'
SELECT * FROM trans WHERE client_id = 3356 AND operation = 'VYBER';

SELECT t.date, t.type, t.amount
FROM trans t
JOIN client c ON t.account_id IN (SELECT d.account_id FROM disp d WHERE d.client_id = c.client_id)
WHERE c.client_id = 3356 AND t.operation = 'VYBER';

SELECT trans.date, trans.amount
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN trans ON disp.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE client.client_id = 3356 AND trans.operation = 'VYBER'
SELECT t1.date, t1.amount FROM trans AS t1 JOIN disp AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id JOIN client AS t3 ON t2.client_id = t3.client_id WHERE t3.client_id = 3356 AND t1.operation = 'VYBER';

SELECT t.trans_id, t.date, t.type, t.operation, t.amount, t.balance
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 3356 AND t.operation = 'VYBER';

SELECT t.date, t.amount, t.operation
FROM trans t
JOIN client c ON t.account_id = c.account_id
WHERE c.client_id = 3356 AND t.operation = 'VYBER';

SELECT t1.date, t1.amount, t1.k_symbol
FROM trans AS t1
JOIN disp AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
JOIN client AS t3 ON t2.client_id = t3.client_id
WHERE t3.client_id = 3356 AND t1.type = 'VYBER';

SELECT T1.date, T1.type, T1.amount
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
WHERE T1.operation = 'VYBER' AND T3.client_id = 3356;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS statement_requests FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'výdej';
SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_debited FROM order WHERE account_id = 3 AND k_symbol = 'mžíček';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS release_count, SUM(amount) AS total_debit_amount FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'Vydání';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_requests, SUM(amount) AS total_amount_debited
FROM trans
JOIN order ON trans.account_id = order.account_id AND trans.k_symbol = order.k_symbol
WHERE trans.account_id = 3 AND trans.k_symbol = '3539'

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS statement_requests,
    SUM(CASE WHEN amount = -3539 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS debits_of_3539,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN amount = -3539 THEN k_symbol END) AS aims_of_debits
FROM 
    trans
WHERE 
    account_id = 3;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'vystavení'
UNION ALL
SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_debit FROM order WHERE amount = 3539

SELECT 
    -- Count the number of times account number 3 requests an account statement
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T.type = 'VYBER' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS num_statements_requested,
    
    -- Sum the total amount debited from account number 3
    SUM(CASE WHEN T.amount < 0 THEN T.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_debit_amount
FROM 
    trans AS T
WHERE 
    T.account_id = 3;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS frequency, SUM(amount) AS total_amount_debited
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN order o ON t.account_id = o.account_id
WHERE a.account_id = 3 AND o.k_symbol = '3539';
SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(amount) FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND k_symbol LIKE '%statement%'

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    loan
JOIN 
    client ON loan.account_id = client.account_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client
JOIN 
    account ON client.client_id = account.client_id
JOIN 
    loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M'

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END))) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    loan l ON c.client_id = l.client_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1997 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M'

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client
JOIN 
    disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN 
    account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN 
    loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client
JOIN 
    disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN 
    account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN 
    loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M';

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 1996 THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_amount_1996,
       SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 1997 THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_amount_1997
FROM loan AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.district_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.year BETWEEN 1996 AND 1997;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1997 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1996 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T4.date) = 1996 THEN T4.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M' AND 
    (YEAR(T1.birth_date) BETWEEN 1996 AND 1997);

189:
SELECT c.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T4.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.account_id
FROM disp d
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
AND c.client_id IN (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
    ORDER BY birth_date ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
AND d.client_id IN (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
    ORDER BY birth_date DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT T2.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T3.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.client_id, T2.account_id
ORDER BY AVG(T3.amount) ASC, T1.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.account_id
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T4.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.account_id, d.A11 AS avg_salary
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN district dt ON c.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.account_id 
FROM client AS T1 
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id 
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id 
LEFT JOIN loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id 
WHERE T1.gender = 'F' 
GROUP BY T1.client_id 
ORDER BY AVG(T4.amount), T1.birth_date ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY date_part('year', current_date) - date_part('year', c.birth_date) DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN

        SELECT 
            district_id 
        FROM

    COUNT(c.client_id) * 100.0 / (
        SELECT COUNT(client_id) 
        FROM client 
        WHERE gender = 'F'
    ) AS percentage_female_clients
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
