    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'F'
    AND d.district_id IN (
        SELECT d.district_id
        FROM district d
        GROUP BY d.district_id
        HAVING AVG(d.A11) > 10000
    );
194:
SELECT c.client_id, CURRENT_DATE - c.birth_date AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM 
    client c
INNER JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
INNER JOIN 
    card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE 
    ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURDATE()) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, c.age
FROM client c
INNER JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
INNER JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT DISTINCT T1.client_id, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birth_date) AS age
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id
JOIN loan AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T3.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    DATE_PART('year', AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM 
    card ca
JOIN 
    disp d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN 
    client cl ON d.client_id = cl.client_id
JOIN 
    district dt ON cl.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE 
    ca.type = 'gold'
    AND d.type = 'OWNER'
    AND dt.A10 > 500;

SELECT c.client_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
AND d.type = 'OWNER'
AND l.status != 'cancelled';

SELECT DISTINCT T1.client_id, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, T1.birth_date) AS age
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id
WHERE T3.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.A2, d.A3, d.A4, d.A5, d.A6, d.A7, d.A8, d.A9, d.A10, d.A11, d.A12, d.A13, d.A14, d.A15, d.A16
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
AND card.type = 'gold'
AND a.account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE status = 'active'
)
119: SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3 FROM trans AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.description LIKE '%POPLATEK PO OBRATU%'

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3
FROM account a
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
AND t.operation LIKE '%POPLATEK PO OBRATU%'

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993';

SELECT T2.account_id, T4.A2, T4.A3 FROM trans AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T1.date) = 1993 JOIN district AS T4 ON T2.district_id = T4.district_id

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3
FROM account a
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type LIKE '%POPLATEK PO OBRATU%' AND YEAR(t.date) = 1993;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1993'
AND T2.date < T1.date

SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    YEAR(t.date) = 1993 AND t.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.date) = 1993;

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.date LIKE '%1993%' AND T2.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
192:
SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
ORDER BY loan.date, trans.date DESC;

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
ORDER BY trans.date DESC;

SELECT AVG(T1.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T1.status = 'C' AND T2.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(T1.amount) 
FROM loan AS T1 
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id 
WHERE T1.status = 'C' AND T2.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';
SELECT AVG(T1.amount) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND T1.status = 'C'

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
AND trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(T2.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T2.status = 'C' AND T1.date > T2.date;

SELECT AVG(l.amount)
FROM loan l
JOIN trans t ON l.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'C' AND t.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

WITH RelevantTransactions AS (
    SELECT 
        l.loan_id,
        l.amount,
        t.date,
        t.operation
    FROM 
        loan l
    JOIN 
        trans t ON l.account_id = t.account_id AND l.status = 'C'
    WHERE 
        t.date BETWEEN l.date AND COALESCE((SELECT MIN(date) FROM trans WHERE account_id = l.account_id AND operation = 'ZAPLATENI'), DATE('9999-12-31'))
)
SELECT 
    AVG(amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM 
    RelevantTransactions;
120:
SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency
FROM account AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND T3.A2 = 'east Bohemia';

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT a.account_id, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM district d
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
GROUP BY a.account_id;

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' GROUP BY T1.account_id

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT T3.account_id, COUNT(T2.operation) AS frequency
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN trans AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T1.birth_date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND T4.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND T4.type = 'statement'
GROUP BY T3.account_id;

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency, COUNT(*) AS count FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' GROUP BY T1.account_id, T1.frequency

SELECT T4.account_id, COUNT(T4.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM district AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN account AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T1.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%'
AND T4.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
GROUP BY T4.account_id;

SELECT a.account_id, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE d.type = 'statement'
AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND c.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A2 = 'east Bohemia'
)
GROUP BY a.account_id;
